definition.en: Emotions also are electrically coded, and also have an independent electrical reality. On a physical level they are both chemical and electrical. The validity and strength of emotions cannot be overestimated, for they represent in only slightly tinged form the uncamouflaged vitality of the universe as it passes through the inner self. Emotions represent, therefore, this vitality before it has been constructed into camouflage.
definition.zh: 情绪也是以电码编码的，并且拥有独立的电性实相。在物质层面上，它们既是化学性的也是电性的。情绪的有效性与力量再怎么强调也不为过，因为它们以仅略带色彩的形式，代表了宇宙那未经伪装的活力，当这活力通过内在自己时便是如此。因此，情绪代表了这活力在它被构建成伪装之前的形态。

definition.en: In the psychological realm it goes without saying that a repressed emotion is never really repressed, since action cannot be retained. It must change. The cause of such difficulties lies not in the repression of an emotion, for this is impossible. The emotion in one way or another, will out, but the difficulty lies in the attempt to repress the emotion. This attempt is itself an action.
definition.zh: 在心理的领域里，不用说，一个被压抑的情绪从未真正被压抑过，因为行动无法被保留。它必须改变。这类困难的原因不在于压抑一个情绪，因为这是不可能的。情绪总会以某种方式出来，但困难在于压抑情绪的企图。这个企图本身就是一种行动。

definition.en: If you are frightened of your emotions and believe them wrong, then when you try 'psychic' experiments you may believe that you are possessed. Your feelings, the repressed ones, will seem demonic. You will be afraid to assign them to yourself, and so will think that they belong to a disembodied spirit. It is very important then that you understand the true innocence of all feelings, for each of them, if left alone and followed, will lead you back to the reality of love.
definition.zh: 如果你害怕你的情绪并认为它们是错的，那么当你尝试“通灵”实验时，你可能会相信你被附身了。你的感受，那些被压抑的，会显得像恶魔一般。你会害怕把它们归于自己，因而认为它们属于一个脱离肉体的灵体。因此，了解所有感受的真正无邪是非常重要的，因为每一个感受，如果被允许存在并被跟随，都会带你回到爱的实相。

definition.en: The moment is remembered because the emotions experienced at the time almost completely fill the psychic space, forcing all other experiences out. The stronger the emotion the more vivid the moment becomes, the more totally it is recalled. And even in future years such past instances can be experienced as vividly as any present experience. In other words, to some large extent such a strong emotion unites experience and knocks down the artificial barrier of past, present and future.
definition.zh: 那个片刻之所以被记住，是因为当时经历的情绪几乎完全充满了心灵空间，迫使所有其他经验退出。情绪越强烈，那个片刻就越生动，它被回忆得就越完整。甚至在未来的岁月里，这样的过去实例可以被体验得如同任何当下经验一样生动。换句话说，在很大的程度上，如此强烈的情绪统一了经验，并击垮了过去、现在与未来的人为障碍。

definition.en: Emotion replenishes even the ego. Emotions demand resiliency, and resiliency is both the result of spontaneity, inner assurance, and discipline. All this is action, for the personality itself is composed of action, and is constantly changing. This is action, therefore, delighting in the expression and form of itself.
definition.zh: 情绪甚至能补充自我。情绪要求韧性，而韧性既是自发性、内在确信与纪律的结果。所有这些都是行动，因为人格本身是由行动组成的，并且不断在改变。因此，这是行动，以其自身的表达与形式为乐。

explanation:
情感/感受是宇宙中真实存在的电磁性力量，而非仅仅是主观心理反应。它们像岩石一样实在，直接作用于物理环境——集体情绪能引发雷暴等自然现象，个人情绪则直接影响身体机制。情感与思想是独立的电性实相，即使被个体拒绝或压抑，仍会以独立形态存在，可能被他人情绪场吸引。

信念决定情感，而非相反。长期抑郁并非凭空降临，而是持续持有消极信念后产生的必然结果。被拒绝的情感会以"叛逆"形式绕过自我控制而爆发，导致看似非理性的行为。情感是意识构建世界的"粘合剂"，改变感受才能获得自由，但完全改变会使现实世界瓦解。

感受有其自身的有效性——"感到自卑"不等于"就是自卑"，这是对信念的情绪反应而非事实陈述。

quotes.text: The overall emotional tone or feeling-level of masses of people, through their body connections with the environment, brings about the exterior physical conditions that initiate such an onslaught of natural energy. (Seth describes feeling-tones in the 613th session in Chapter One.) According to the mass emotional conditions, various excesses are built up physically; these are then thrown off into the atmosphere in different form. The ghost chemicals mentioned earlier (in the last session) play a part here, and the electromagnetic properties of emotions. A rock in a stream will divide the water so that it must flow around the impediment. Your emotions are quite as real as rocks. Your collective feelings affect the flow of energy and their force -- in terms of natural phenomena -- can be seen quite clearly in a thunderstorm, which is the exteriorized local materialization of the inner emotional state of the people experiencing the storm.
quotes.translation: 大众的整体情绪基调或感受层次，通过其身体与环境的连接，会引发外在物理条件，从而启动如此猛烈的自然能量冲击。（赛斯在第613节第一章中描述了感受基调。）根据大众的情绪状况，各种过剩能量在物理层面累积；随后这些能量以不同形式被释放到大气中。先前（上一节）提到的幽灵化学物质在此发挥作用，情绪的电动力学特性亦然。溪流中的岩石会分流河水，迫使水流绕过障碍。你们的情绪与岩石同样真实。集体感受会影响能量流动——就自然现象而言——其力量在雷暴中清晰可见，这正是经历风暴者内在情绪状态的外显局部物质化。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As to your jottings this morning concerning art, very good, I commend you. You are already beginning to think in new and divider concepts. As your paintings are solidified feeling on board or paper, apparent in the physical universe and therefore vulnerable to the laws of that universe, so is the universe itself on your plane physical materialized feeling, only with more dimension than a drawing or a painting. There is however also an extra dimension in a painting than people usually recognize, beside the lines and color and form and content, which are as you said so aptly feeling solidified. You have the action of which you also spoke. First you have the action of the lines, form and content and so forth, caught and solidified, then as an observer looks at a painting feeling is again motion moving out from the painting into the beholder's perception.
quotes.translation: 至于今早关于艺术的随笔，写得很好，我赞赏你。你已开始以全新且更具区分性的概念思考。正如你的画作是凝固在画板或纸张上的感受，在物质宇宙中显化并受其法则制约，你们层面的宇宙本身也是物质化的感受，只是比素描或绘画多了一个维度。然而，画作中还存在人们通常未能察觉的额外维度——除了线条、色彩、形式与内容（如你精妙所言，是凝固的感受）之外。你亦提及"动作"这一概念。首先是线条、形式与内容等元素的动作被捕捉并凝固，随后当观察者凝视画作时，感受再次作为运动从画作流向观者的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Emotions are also, then, actualities within the overall electric system, existing not as representations of feeling, but as definite charged action. I want if possible to get the idea over that this system involves realities that are directly experienced and vivid, and also that in some ways emotions and thoughts are more directly perceived in that field than your physical field. They are more readily apparent, with more force behind them acting directly upon the electric environment, without any intermediary steps; that is, they, emotions and feelings and thoughts, exist immediately within the environment as electrical forces within that system. In your system they need to be translated and given reality by a method of interrelationships. Your field attains its actuality only as a result of the cooperating merger of many other independent systems.
quotes.translation: 因此，情绪同样是整体电力系统内的实相，它们并非感受的表征，而是明确的带电动作。若可能，我希望传达这样的概念：这个系统涉及直接体验且鲜活的实相，同时在某些方面，情绪与思想在该场域中的感知比在物质场域中更为直接。它们更易显现，其背后蕴含更强大的力量直接作用于电力环境，无需任何中间步骤；即情绪、感受与思想作为该系统中的电力力量，直接存在于环境之中。而在你们的系统中，它们需要经过关系互动的方法被转化并赋予实相。你们的场域唯有通过众多其他独立系统的协作融合，才能获得其现实性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We must go much further into this particular subject. Nevertheless it must be clearly understood that thoughts and emotions are actualities in themselves. that directly work upon the physical mechanism. Any thought or emotion is bound to directly affect the physical body. Because thoughts and emotions, as electrical actualities, are independent from their subjective point of origin, a given thought or emotion, initiated by an individual, may be rejected by him and cast out. If the thought or emotion is similar to those usually accepted, then this will take time, for new electrical patterns must be set up. But an idea, thought or emotion so rejected still has independent actuality, and may be attracted to the emotional climate of another.
quotes.translation: 我们必须更深入探讨这个主题。但必须明确理解：思想与情绪本身就是实相，直接作用于物理机制。任何思想或情绪都必然直接影响身体。由于思想与情绪作为电力实相独立于其主观起源点，个体发起的特定思想或情绪可能被他拒绝并驱逐。若该思想或情绪与通常被接受的相似，则需时间建立新的电力模式。但被拒绝的想法、思想或情绪仍具有独立实相，可能被另一个人的情绪气候所吸引。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We will then resume dictation. (Pause.) Your beliefs generate emotion. It is somewhat fashionable to place feelings above conscious thoughts, the idea being that emotions are more basic and natural than conscious reasoning is. The two actually go together but your conscious thinking largely determines your emotions, and not the other way around. Your beliefs generate the appropriate emotion that is implied. A long period of inner depression does not just come upon you. Your emotions do not betray you. Instead, over a period of time you have been consciously entertaining negative beliefs that then generated the strong feelings of despondency.
quotes.translation: 我们继续口述。（停顿。）你们的信念产生情绪。将感受置于意识思考之上是某种流行观念，认为情绪比意识推理更基本、更自然。两者实则相辅相成，但你们的意识思考在很大程度上决定情绪，而非相反。你们的信念会生成其隐含的相应情绪。长期的内在抑郁并非凭空降临。你们的情绪不会背叛你们。相反，你们在相当一段时间内有意识地持有负面信念，这些信念继而产生了强烈的沮丧感受。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The rejected emotion, in other words, will express itself in any case, but it will do so then as a rebel, outside of the organizational directives of the ego itself. Hence for example, actions that appear senseless to the ego are often the results of such unassimilated or denied emotions. At one time or another such emotions were acceptable to the ego. There was an attraction, or the emotion would not have been permitted to enter into a realm close to ego control.
quotes.translation: 被拒绝的情绪无论如何都会表达自身，但此时它将作为叛逆者，脱离自我本身的组织指令。例如，对自我而言看似无意义的行为，往往是此类未被同化或否认的情绪的结果。这些情绪在某个时刻曾为自我所接纳。若没有吸引力，情绪根本不会被允许进入接近自我控制的领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: All manner of insects, birds and beasts cooperate in this venture, producing the natural environment. This is as normal and inevitable as the fact that your breath causes a mist to form on glass if you breathe upon it. All consciousness creates the world, rising out of feeling-tone. It is a natural product of what your consciousness is. Feelings and emotions emerge into reality in certain specific ways. Thoughts appear, growing on the bed already laid. The seasons spring up, formed by ancient feeling-tones, having deep and abiding rhythms. They are the result, again, of innate creative aspects that are a portion of all life.
quotes.translation: 各类昆虫、鸟类和兽类都参与这项事业，共同创造出自然环境。这就像你对着玻璃呼气会形成雾气一样自然且必然。所有意识都从感受基调中升起，创造着世界。这是你意识本质的自然产物。感受和情绪以特定方式显化为现实。思想在已铺就的床榻上生长。季节由古老的感受基调形成，具有深沉持久的韵律。它们同样是所有生命固有创造面向的结果。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Intellectual truth alone will not make you free, though it is certainly a necessary preliminary. If this were the case your walls would fall away, since intellectually you understand their rather dubious nature. Since feeling is so often the cohesive with which mind builds, it is feeling itself which must be changed if you would find freedom from your particular plane of existence at your particular time. That is, to some extent a change in feeling will allow you to see variants. Since feeling is a cohesive, to change it completely would hardly be of any advantage since your world of present existence would fall apart.
quotes.translation: 仅凭智性真理无法让你获得自由，尽管这无疑是必要的先决条件。倘若如此，你的围墙本应倒塌——因为你在智性上已理解其可疑本质。既然感受常是心灵构建的粘合剂，若要在特定时空摆脱存在层面，就必须改变感受本身。也就是说，感受的改变能在某种程度上让你看见不同变体。由于感受是粘合剂，彻底改变它并无益处，因为你当前的存在世界将会分崩离析。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Ruburt advised Andrea to accept the validity of such feelings as feelings -- not to inhibit them, but to follow their flow with the understanding that they are feelings about reality. As themselves they are real. They express emotional reactions to beliefs. The next time Andrea feels inadequate, for example, she is to actively experience that feeling, realizing that even though she feels inferior this does not mean that she is inferior. She is to say, "I feel inferior," and at the same time to understand that the feeling is not a statement of fact but of emotion. A different kind of validity is involved.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏建议安德莉亚接纳这类感受的有效性——既不压抑它们，也不跟随其流动，但要明白这些只是对实相的感受。作为感受本身，它们是真实的。它们表达了对信念的情绪反应。例如下次安德莉亚感到不足时，她应主动体验这种感受，同时意识到即使感到自卑，也不代表她真的低人一等。她要说"我感到自卑"，同时理解这感受并非事实陈述，而是情绪表达。这涉及另一种有效性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This will show you how the thoughts brought about the physical malady, and which ones were involved. The same thing should then be done with the feeling pattern. This may be perceived as bursts of dark or light colors in motion, or simply one particular emotion of great force may be felt. If it is very strong, one emotion may be felt in many such guises. In the case of both thoughts and emotions, with great confidence you pluck out those that are connected with the malady. In such a manner you have made adjustments on three levels.
quotes.translation: 这将向你展示思想如何引发身体疾病，以及哪些思想参与其中。对感受模式也应采取相同做法。这可能被感知为运动中明暗色彩的爆发，或单纯感受到某种强烈情绪。若情绪非常强烈，一种情绪可能以多种伪装形式被感知。在处理思想与情绪时，你要充满信心地摘除与疾病相关的部分。通过这种方式，你在三个层面完成了调整。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Whenever circumstances tend to revitalize such a charged emotion, that particular now will be re-created. The emotion will once again rush into the psychic space which is formed by elements in the personality's psychological environment. The immediate emotion of any moment, therefore, forms the framework of your present time within the waking state. As the emotion diminishes it takes up less of your psychic space, fills up less of your inner environment, and you seem to yourself to recede from it.
quotes.translation: 每当环境倾向于重振这种带电情绪时，那个特定的"当下"就会被重新创造。情绪会再次涌入由人格心理环境元素构成的心灵空间。因此，清醒状态下任何时刻的即时情绪都构成了你当前时间的框架。当情绪减弱时，它占据的心灵空间减少，内在环境被填充的部分缩小，你便感觉自己从情绪中抽离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This artificial aggressiveness has nothing to do either, basically, with the struggle for survival. It is the direct result of the fact that the male has been taught to deny the existence within himself of certain basic emotions. This means that he denies a certain portion of his own humanity, and then is forced to overreact in expressing those emotions left open to him. The reasons for such a lopsided focus have been discussed at various times in my works. The male, however, chose to take upon himself a kind of specialization of consciousness that, carried too far, leads to a hard over-objectivity. Only in dreams in your time, in your society, is the male free to cry unabashedly, to admit any kind of dependency, and only at certain occasions and usually in relative privacy is he allowed to express feelings of love.
quotes.translation: 这种人为的攻击性与生存竞争也基本无关。它直接源于男性被教导否认自身某些基本情绪的存在。这意味着他否认了自身人性的某部分，随后被迫在表达被允许的情绪时过度反应。我在作品中多次讨论过这种失衡焦点的成因。但男性选择承担某种意识专门化，若过度发展会导致僵硬的过度客观性。在你所处的时代与社会中，男性只有在梦境中才能毫无羞愧地哭泣，承认任何形式的依赖，且只有在特定场合（通常相对私密时）才被允许表达爱的感受。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The moment is remembered because the emotions experienced at the time almost completely fill the psychic space, forcing all other experiences out. The stronger the emotion the more vivid the moment becomes, the more totally it is recalled. And even in future years such past instances can be experienced as vividly as any present experience. In other words, to some large extent such a strong emotion unites experience and knocks down the artificial barrier of past, present and future.
quotes.translation: 那一刻之所以被铭记，是因为当时经历的情感几乎完全占据了心灵空间，将所有其他体验排挤出去。情感越强烈，那一刻就越生动，回忆起来也越完整。即使在多年以后，这些过往的片段也能像任何当下体验一样鲜活地被重新经历。换言之，在相当程度上，这种强烈的情感统一了体验，打破了过去、现在和未来之间人为的屏障。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are innumerable relationships that exist between the interior environment of the body and the weather patterns. The ancient feelings of identification with storms are quite valid, and in that respect the "realism" of feelings is far superior to the realism of logic. When a person feels a part of a storm, those feelings speak a literal truth. Logic deals with exterior conditions, with cause-and-effect relationships. Intuitions deal with immediate experience of the most intimate nature, with subjective motions and activities that in your terms move far quicker than the speed of light, and with simultaneous events that your cause-and-effect level is far too slow to perceive.2
quotes.translation: 身体的内在环境与天气模式之间存在着无数关联。古代那种与风暴融为一体的感受是完全有效的，在这方面，情感的"现实主义"远胜于逻辑的现实主义。当一个人感觉自己与风暴融为一体时，这些情感道出了字面上的真实。逻辑处理的是外在条件、因果关系。直觉处理的是最亲密的直接体验、主观的运动和活动——以你们的时间尺度而言，这些活动远快于光速——以及你们因果层面过于迟缓而无法感知的同时性事件。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

SESSION 803, MAY 2, 1977
9:43 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Emotions take up a certain amount of what we call psychic space within the personality's awareness. As the intensity of the emotion fades, so it seems to you that it recedes in time. But this is an illusion caused by the limitations of your outer senses. Now. In the dream state the outer senses are to a large degree restrained in their activity. Therefore the dream state more clearly represents the actual nature of time. Intense emotions within the dream state are experienced as present time, and the personality moves easily through these emotional intensities without experiencing the sense of passing time, although any given dream may contain within it its own time element.
quotes.translation: 情感在人格意识中占据了我们所谓的特定心灵空间。随着情感强度的减弱，在你们看来它似乎在时间中退却了。但这是一种由外在感官局限造成的幻觉。现在。在梦境状态中，外在感官的活动在很大程度上受到限制。因此，梦境状态更清晰地代表了时间的真实本质。梦境中的强烈情感被体验为当下时刻，人格在这些情感强度中轻松移动，而不会感受到时间的流逝，尽管任何特定的梦境都可能包含其自身的时间元素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: Disconnected from their usual daily attraction to physical events, your emotions will often form their own landscapes, utilizing dreams as their creative medium. I have explained the great correlation that exists between your feelings and beliefs and physical conditions such as weather. (See Chapter Eighteen.) In somewhat the same way, you have a part to play individually in the creation of the dream landscape. It is also the result of your feelings and beliefs on a different level, and while it is not perceivable in physical terms -- laid out with its mountains and continents as your planet is, to be examined by your instruments -- it exists in terms quite as valid.
quotes.translation: 当你的情感脱离了对物理事件惯常的日常关注时，它们往往会利用梦境作为创造媒介，形成自己的风景。我已经解释过你的感受和信念与天气等物理条件之间存在的巨大关联（见第十八章）。在某种程度上，你在创造梦境风景时也扮演着个体角色。它也是你的感受和信念在不同层面的结果，虽然它无法以物理方式被感知——像你们的星球那样铺展着山脉和大陆，供你们的仪器检测——但它以同样有效的方式存在着。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In the psychological realm it goes without saying that a repressed emotion is never really repressed, since action cannot be retained. It must change. The cause of such difficulties lies not in the repression of an emotion, for this is impossible. The emotion in one way or another, will out, but the difficulty lies in the attempt to repress the emotion. This attempt is itself an action.
quotes.translation: 在心理领域，不言而喻的是，被压抑的情感从未真正被压抑，因为行动无法被保留。它必须改变。这类困难的根源不在于压抑情感——因为这是不可能的——情感总会以某种方式表达出来，而在于试图压抑情感的企图。这种企图本身就是一种行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: What did you wear to work three days ago? What did you have for breakfast a week ago? Who sat next to you in kindergarten? What frightened you last? Are you afraid of sleep? Did your parents beat you? What did you do just after lunch yesterday? What color shoes did you wear three days ago? You remember only significant events or details. Your emotions trigger your memories, and they organize your associations. Your emotions are generated through your beliefs. They attach themselves so that certain beliefs and emotions seem almost synonymous.
quotes.translation: 三天前你穿什么去上班？一周前你早餐吃了什么？幼儿园时谁坐在你旁边？最近一次让你害怕的是什么？你害怕睡眠吗？你的父母打过你吗？昨天午饭后你做了什么？三天前你穿了什么颜色的鞋子？你只记得重要的事件或细节。你的情感触发你的记忆，并组织你的联想。你的情感通过你的信念产生。它们彼此依附，以至于某些信念和情感几乎成了同义词。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （I was still aware of the feeling of enlargement in my right hand. I was careful not to confuse this with any cramping effect from holding a pen for so long. However, the feeling now became more pronounced, so that when I made a fist my fingers felt thicker, against a thicker palm, giving a feeling of restricted movement. Usually such effects begin to wane as soon as a session ends, but in this instance the sensation was stronger than ever five minutes later. It lasted for some fifteen minutes or so, during which time it gradually declined.
quotes.translation: 我仍能感受到右手膨胀的感觉。我小心不将这误认为长时间握笔造成的抽筋效应。然而此刻这种感觉愈发明显，当我握拳时手指仿佛变厚了，抵着更厚实的掌心，产生动作受限的触感。通常这类效应在课程结束后便会消退，但这次五分钟后感觉反而更强烈，持续约十五分钟才逐渐减弱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This, and all such effects, represent one of the most basic ways in which one action causes another action to change. These definite fields operate as channels for inner communications. They may be formed instantly, sweeping out into other directions. They open through attraction. This attraction may originate as an emotional one, but the emotional feeling has its own electromagnetism, and the attraction is in direct proportion to the force of the emotion itself, or to the charge that the emotion may carry.
quotes.translation: 这种效应及所有类似现象，都代表着一种行为引发另一种行为变化的最基本方式。这些明确的场域作为内在沟通的通道运作，可瞬间形成并向外扩散。它们通过吸引力开启，这种吸引力可能源于情感，但情感本身具有电磁特性，吸引力与情感强度或其携带的能量成正比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Each thought or emotion therefore exists as an electromagnetic energy unit or as a combination of these under certain conditions, and often with the help of coordinate points, they emerge into the building blocks of physical matter. This emergence into matter occurs as a neutral "result" regardless of the nature of any given thought or emotion. Mental images, accompanied by strong emotion, are blueprints therefore upon which a corresponding physical object, or condition or event, will in your terms appear.
quotes.translation: 因此每个思想或情感都作为电磁能量单位存在，或在特定条件下组合，常借助坐标点转化为物质实相的建筑模块。这种物质化呈现为中性"结果"，不论思想或情感的本质为何。伴随强烈情感的心像，便是对应物质客体、状态或事件在你们时间范畴内显化的蓝图。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inhibition of such emotions also interferes with the nervous system and its therapeutic devices. These repressed emotions, and the whole charge behind such distorted concepts about the unconscious, result in a projection outward upon others. In your individual area there will be persons upon whom you will project all of those charged, frightening emotions or characteristics. At the same time you will be drawn to those individuals because the projections represent a part of you.
quotes.translation: 压抑情感会干扰神经系统及其疗愈机制。这些被压抑的情感，连同扭曲潜意识概念背后的全部能量，会向外投射到他人身上。在你的个人领域里，总会有某些人成为你投射所有强烈恐惧情感或特质的对象。同时你又被这些人吸引，因为投射代表着你自身的一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If you are frightened of your emotions and believe them wrong, then when you try "psychic" experiments you may believe that you are possessed. Your feelings, the repressed ones, will seem demonic. You will be afraid to assign them to yourself, and so will think that they belong to a disembodied spirit. It is very important then that you understand the true innocence of all feelings, for each of them, if left alone and followed, will lead you back to the reality of love.
quotes.translation: 若你恐惧自身情感并认定其有罪，那么尝试"灵性"实验时可能误以为自己被附身。被压抑的情感会显得如恶魔般可怖，你不敢承认它们属于自己，便认为是无形灵体所为。因此理解所有情感本真的纯真至关重要——每种情感若任其自然流动，终将引领你回归爱的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There may or may not be disorientation on your part, according to your beliefs and development. Now I do not necessarily mean intellectual development. The intellect should go hand in hand with the emotions and intuitions, but if it pulls against these too strongly, difficulties can arise when the newly freed consciousness seizes upon its ideas about reality after death, rather than facing the particular reality in which it finds itself. It can deny feeling, in other words, and even attempt to argue itself out of its present independence from the body.
quotes.translation: 根据你的信念与成长程度，你可能会或不会产生迷失感。我并非特指智力发展。理智应与情感直觉携手并进，若过度对抗，当新获解放的意识执着于死后实相的观念，而非直面当下所处的特定实相时，困境便会产生。换言之，它可能否认感受，甚至试图说服自己脱离当前独立于肉体的状态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This does not mean that the personality must be completely swept away by an emotion, though this is what such an ego fears. Emotion replenishes even the ego. Emotions demand resiliency, and resiliency is both the result of spontaneity, inner assurance, and discipline. All this is action, for the personality itself is composed of action, and is constantly changing. This is action, therefore, delighting in the expression and form of itself.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着人格必须被情绪完全淹没，尽管这正是自我所恐惧的。情绪甚至能滋养自我。情绪需要弹性，而弹性既是自发性、内在确信和自律的结果。这一切都是行动，因为人格本身由行动构成，且不断变化。因此，这是行动在自我表达与形态中的欢愉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (She described some subjective experiences she thought the personality was going to have her experience. A feeling of microscopic smallness approaching, the reverse of the giant feeling, etc. I told her she'd have to write out the data. She said the ideas were quickly leaving; the feelings were without words and she wasn't used to that yet. She thinks she panics and so shuts the voice off. The pyramid effect was dwindling by 11:15.
quotes.translation: （她描述了一些主观体验，认为人格将经历这些体验。一种接近微观渺小的感觉，与巨人感的反面等等。我告诉她必须把这些资料写下来。她说这些想法正在迅速消散；这些感觉没有语言，她还不习惯。她认为自己惊慌失措，于是关闭了声音。到11:15时，金字塔效应逐渐减弱。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Emotions also are electrically coded, and also have an independent electrical reality. On a physical level they are both chemical and electrical. The validity and strength of emotions cannot be overestimated, for they represent in only slightly tinged form the uncamouflaged vitality of the universe as it passes through the inner self. Emotions represent, therefore, this vitality before it has been constructed into camouflage.
quotes.translation: 情绪也以电性方式编码，并具有独立的电性实相。在物质层面上，它们既是化学性的也是电性的。情绪的有效性和力量不可低估，因为它们以仅略微染色的形式，代表了宇宙未经伪装的活力，当这活力通过内在自我时。因此，情绪代表了这种活力在它被构建成伪装之前的形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The more intense your imagination and inner experience, therefore, the more important it is that you realize the methods by which this inner experience becomes physically real. Your thoughts and emotions begin their journey into physical actualization at the moment of conception. If you happen to live in an area where the coordinate environment is strong, one of those areas I have spoken of as unusually conducive, then it will seem that you are deluged by illnesses or disasters, if these are the nature of your thoughts, because all thought is so fertile in this environment. If, on the other hand, your feelings and subjective experience are fairly well balanced, fairly optimistic and creative in a constructive manner, then it will seem to you that you have been blessed with unusual luck, for your pleasant suppositions will come to pass so quickly.
quotes.translation: 因此，你的想象力和内在体验越强烈，你就越需要认识到这种内在体验转化为物质实相的方法。你的思想和情绪在受孕的那一刻就开始进入物质实现的旅程。如果你恰好生活在一个坐标环境强烈的地区——那些我提到过的异常有利的地区之一——那么如果你的思想本质如此，你似乎会被疾病或灾难淹没，因为所有思想在这种环境中都如此丰饶。另一方面，如果你的感受和主观体验相当平衡、相当乐观且以建设性的方式具有创造力，那么你会觉得自己被异常的好运眷顾，因为你愉快的假设会如此迅速地实现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am not saying that, nor implying it in the case just mentioned. In your system you have a direct hand in the formation of physical reality. Your natural given data is the result of individual, mass, and collective thoughts, feelings, and emotions, materialized. Your system in this respect is more creative than the systems just mentioned. On the other hand, within these other systems there is a strong innovative group consciousness developing, in which identity is retained but greater inner play allowed between individuals, a large creative interchange of symbol-pools, a drawing upon mental and psychic symbols with greater facility. Because of this, these individuals recognize more clearly the connection between creative images and given sense data. They purposely alter and change their given sense data, and experiment with it.
quotes.translation: 我并不是在说，也没有在刚才提到的情况中暗示这一点。在你的系统中，你直接参与了物质实相的形成。你天生的给定资料是个体、群体和集体的思想、感受和情绪物质化的结果。在这方面，你的系统比刚才提到的系统更具创造力。另一方面，在这些其他系统中，正在发展一种强大的创新群体意识，其中身份得以保留，但个体之间允许更大的内在互动，符号库之间进行大量的创造性交流，更自如地运用心智和心灵符号。正因为如此，这些个体更清晰地认识到创造性意象与给定感官资料之间的联系。他们有意改变和调整自己的给定感官资料，并对其进行实验。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In usual circumstances you may remember the emotions that you felt at the time a picture of yourself was taken, and to some extent those emotions may show themselves in gestures or facial expression. But the greater subjective reality of that moment does not appear physically in such a photograph. It completely escapes insofar as its physical appearance within that structure is concerned. In the same way the past or the future is closed out. The particular focus necessary to produce such a picture then necessitates the exclusion of other data. That certainly is obvious. Because you must manipulate within specific time periods, you do the same kind of thing in daily life, and on a conscious level ignore or exclude much information that is otherwise available.
quotes.translation: 在通常情况下，你可能记得自己照片拍摄时的情绪，这些情绪在一定程度上可能通过姿态或面部表情表现出来。但那一刻更大的主观实相并不会在这样一张照片中物质地显现。就其在该结构中的物质外观而言，它完全逃逸了。同样，过去或未来也被排除在外。要产生这样一张照片所需的特定焦点，必然需要排除其他资料。这当然显而易见。因为你必须在特定的时间段内操作，你在日常生活中也做着同样的事情，在有意识层面上忽略或排除了许多原本可用的信息。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 699
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Dictation: One of man's strongest attributes is religious feeling. It is the part of psychology most often overlooked. There is a natural religious knowledge with which you are born. Ruburt's book The Afterdeath Journal of an American Philosopher: The World View of William James explains that feeling very well. It is a biological spirituality translated into verbal terms. It says: "Life is a gift (and not a curse). I am a unique, worthy creature in the natural world, which everywhere surrounds me, gives me sustenance, and reminds me of the greater source from which I myself and the world both emerge. My body is delightfully suited to its environment, and comes to me, again, from that unknown source which shows itself through all of the events of the physical world."
quotes.translation: 口授：人类最强烈的特质之一便是宗教情感。这是心理学中最常被忽视的部分。你生来就拥有一种天然的宗教认知。鲁柏的著作《一位美国哲学家的死后日记：威廉·詹姆士的世界观》将这种情感阐释得极为透彻。这是一种转化为语言表述的生物性灵性。它说："生命是礼物（而非诅咒）。我是自然世界中独特而有价值的造物，自然环绕着我，滋养着我，并提醒着我那更伟大的源头——我自身与世界皆由此而生。我的身体与环境完美契合，这具身体同样来自那通过物质世界所有事件彰显自身的未知源头。"
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Finally: Just before tonight's session Jane said she thought Seth might do some work on Mass Events. She had a question about herself, and I asked for a few lines from Seth on whether she just might have been born left-handed. I want to use the material in connection with a passage I'm putting together for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality. [See the excerpts from Session 211, in Appendix 18 of that work.] However, Seth didn't answer my question.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: New paragraph (and more rapidly): As egotistical consciousness expands to include hereto largely neglected data, then it will experience, practically speaking, a new kind of identity; knowing itself differently. Its concepts of godhood will significantly alter, as will the dimensions of emotion. Your heritage includes vastly richer veins of love, yet your concepts of self and godhood have severely limited these. You often seem to hate those with different beliefs than your own, for example, and you have perpetrated cruelties upon others in the name of religion and in the name of science, because your limited ideas about the nature of the self led you to fear your emotions. Often you are afraid that love will overwhelm you, for instance.
quotes.translation: 新段落（语速加快）：当自我意识扩展至包含迄今被忽视的大量数据时，它实际上将体验到一种全新的身份认同——以不同方式认知自身。其对神性的概念将发生重大改变，情感维度亦将随之变化。你的传承中蕴藏着远为丰沛的爱之矿脉，但你对自我与神性的认知却严重限制了这些。例如，你常常憎恨那些信仰与你不同的人，并以宗教与科学之名对他人施以暴行，皆因你对自我本质的狭隘认知导致你恐惧自身的情感。举例而言，你常害怕爱会令你失控。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 686
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: (After coming out, kept feeling inclined to go right; as if partially moving out of my body but not nearly that strong or vivid; merely a feeling that I wasn't entirely inside body but half out to the right in a shadowy rather than substantial fashion. If this would be called hallucinatory by psychologists, then of course far more than vision was involved; the massive quality was definitely sensed directly and vividly. Objects were actually sensed as shapes and forms of volume and weight (?) not sure of weight. Kinetic changes suggest altering of nervous connections, I would suppose. The experience was strangely soundless, and this may have added to frightening quality; didn't think of this before.
quotes.translation: （出神后，持续感到向右倾斜的倾向；仿佛部分脱离身体，但远未达到强烈或生动的程度；仅是一种不完全在体内、半身向右悬于阴影而非实体状态的感受。若心理学家称之为幻觉，那么显然涉及远超视觉的范畴；那种厚重质感确被直接而生动地感知。物体实际被感知为具有体积与重量（？）的形状形态——重量感不确定。我推测，运动知觉的变化暗示着神经连接的改变。这场体验奇异地毫无声响，或许正因此增添了恐怖特质；此前未曾想到这点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The habitual pattern or characteristic nature of the ego may then be led to refuse to accept an emotion, at the same time that a pattern has already been set to receive the particular type of emotion. Here the ego fights against itself. Such an emotion may of course be given release through dreams, but this is of limited value to the ego involved, since the ego does not accept the reality of dream existence.
quotes.translation: 自我惯常的模式或特性可能导致其拒绝接受某种情感，即便接收特定类型情感的模式已然建立。此时自我陷入自我对抗。此类情感当然可通过梦境释放，但对涉事自我而言价值有限，因其不承认梦境存在的真实性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Feelings of violence accumulated early, but in his family there were no acceptable ways of releasing normal aggressive feelings. When these built up into felt, violent eruptions, Augustus was only the more convinced of his unacceptable nature. For some time in his normal state as a teenager, he tried harder and harder to be "good." This meant the banishing of thoughts or impulses that were sexually inspired along various lines, aggressive, or even just unconventional. Considerable energy was used to inhibit these portions of his inner experience. The denied mental events did not disappear, however. They increased in intensity and were kept apart from his "safer" usual thoughts.
quotes.translation: 暴力情绪在早年积累，但其家庭中缺乏释放正常攻击性情感的可接受方式。当这些情绪累积至爆发性暴怒时，奥古斯都反而更确信自己本性不可接受。青少年时期正常状态下，他愈发努力试图"做个好人"。这意味着驱逐各种性激发、攻击性乃至不合常规的念头或冲动。大量精力被用于压抑这些内在经验。然而被否定的心理事件并未消失。它们强度递增，并被隔离于其"更安全"的惯常思维之外。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is therefore with the second alternating group of characteristics that most such problems arise. An ego who can, and has at one time or another accepted as part of itself a violent and unruly desire to kill, for example, will not automatically reject the emotion of hatred. He may dislike it, but he will recognize it as a part of himself during whatever period it is assimilated. An ego which once accepted such an idea of violence, and knew it as a possibility of action, such an ego, if he then rejects the conception, can no longer afford, ever, to recognize this once acceptable emotion, for he is only too aware of the action that could have at one time developed.
quotes.translation: 因此，大多数此类问题源于第二组交替特征。例如，一个曾接纳暴力与失控杀戮欲望作为自身一部分的自我，不会自动排斥仇恨情感。他可能厌恶它，但在其被同化的任何时期都会承认它是自身的一部分。一个曾接纳此类暴力概念、知晓其可能转化为行动的自我——若其随后摒弃此概念，便再也无法承认这曾可接受的情感，因他太清楚那曾可能发展出的行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. In your system of reality you are learning what mental energy is, and how to use it. You do this by constantly transforming your thoughts and emotions into physical form. You are supposed to get a clear picture of your inner development by perceiving the exterior environment. What seems to be a perception, an objective concrete event, independent and apart from you the perceiver, is instead the physical materiaizationl of the perceiver's own inner emotions, energy and mental environment. As long as scientists insist upon considering the perceiver and the perceived event as entirely separate, then the true nature of perception will not be understood.
quotes.translation: 现在。在你们的实相系统中，你们正在学习什么是心灵能量，以及如何使用它。你们通过不断将思想和情感转化为物质形态来做到这一点。你们本应通过感知外部环境来清晰了解自己的内在发展。看似是一种感知、一个客观具体的事件，独立于作为感知者的你之外，实际上却是感知者自身内在情感、能量和心灵环境的物质化。只要科学家坚持认为感知者和被感知事件是完全分离的，那么感知的真实本质就无法被理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This happens more often than is recognized, because usually you simply discount the feeling of strangeness, and drop the part of the memory that does not fit. Such instances involve definite bleedthroughs, however. By being alert and catching such feelings, you can learn to use the floating part of the otherwise-recognizable memory as a focus. Through association that focus can then trigger further past or future recall. Clues also appear in the dreaming state, with greater frequency, because then you are already accustomed to that kind of floating sensation in which events can seem to happen in their own relatively independent context.
quotes.translation: 这种情况发生的频率比人们认识到的要高，因为通常你们只是忽略了那种陌生感，并丢弃了不符合的部分记忆。然而，这类实例涉及明确的渗透。通过保持警觉并捕捉这些感觉，你们可以学会将原本可识别记忆中的浮动部分作为焦点。通过联想，这个焦点随后可以触发对过去或未来的进一步回忆。线索也出现在梦境状态中，频率更高，因为那时你们已经习惯了那种浮动感，在这种感觉中，事件似乎可以在它们相对独立的背景中发生。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (First, after holding session 805 we took a six-week break from sessions of any kind. We didn't plan to do this; it just developed, and we eventually realized that it did so through Jane's simple need for a change in routine. We had plenty of other things to do: I was still occupied daily with writing notes and appendixes for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality; on June 4 Jane received the page proofs for Cézanne, and began correcting them for the printer; on the 14th of the month "our" contractor began converting half of our garage into a writing room for Jane, and adding a large back porch [see the end of Note 2 for Session 801]. All of that building activity was much noisier and more disruptive than the work had been for the front porch, and forced some changes in our schedules, including more night work, as we manipulated around those distractions.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You should first of all admit that the feelings exist as a part of yourself, at the ego level. Whenever you close your feelings off from yourself you are, in your terms, less alive. Then, as far as is possible, communicate those feelings verbally in whatever way you choose. Use anger as a method of communication. Often it will lead to results that you do not think of, and beneficial ones.
quotes.translation: 首先，你们应该承认这些感觉是自我的一部分，在自我层面。每当你们对自己封闭感觉时，从你们的角度来说，你们就变得不那么有活力了。然后，尽可能以你们选择的任何方式用语言表达这些感觉。将愤怒作为一种沟通方式。它常常会带来你们意想不到的结果，而且是有益的结果。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Life goes on, then, only it's different. Of course my feelings, while being unique in that they're my own, are intimately bound up with those of everyone else. How could it be otherwise, since no one can live in true isolation? Each one of us is an immortal portion, a spark of endless perception and beauty and feeling -- and yes, of conflict and denial at times -- within this probable reality that we're all creating together, even when we don't know we're doing it! I watch with awe as within this reality each one of us expresses as best we can our creative understanding of this wonderful mystery.
quotes.translation: 生命继续前行，只是方式不同了。当然，我的感觉虽然独特，因为是属于我自己的，却与每个人的感觉紧密相连。否则怎么可能呢，因为没有人能真正孤立地生活？我们每个人都是不朽的一部分，是无限感知、美和感觉的火花——是的，有时也是冲突和否定的火花——在这个我们共同创造的可能性实相中，即使我们不知道自己在这样做！我敬畏地注视着，在这个实相中，我们每个人都尽其所能地表达着对这个奇妙奥秘的创造性理解。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All of them cast certain "atmospheric conditions" or reflections that color physical events as you know them. Some of your own feelings are propelled into a reality within such systems, adopting within that framework their own mass and form. In the creation and maintenance of your normal reality, you focus your daily waking consciousness so that it becomes effective within the ranges necessary. Ideas and feelings that you want made physical carry within them the mechanisms that will put them in the proper range, well within the electromagnetic field necessary for physical development.
quotes.translation: 它们都投射出某些“大气条件”或反射，为你们所知的物理事件着色。你们自己的一些感觉被推进到这类系统中的实相里，在该框架内获得它们自己的质量和形态。在创造和维持你们正常实相的过程中，你们聚焦于日常清醒意识，使其在必要的范围内变得有效。你们想要物质化的想法和感觉，其内部携带着将它们置于适当范围的机制，恰好处于物理发展所需的电磁场之内。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you tell yourself that sexual feeling is wrong, and organize your daily programming in that fashion, then when you "meditate," or dispense with that orientation, you may suddenly find yourself presented with material that you consider unsavory. You cannot deny the reality of the psyche, or those natural feelings that you experience in the flesh. When you begin to alter your perception, then, and your habitual picture of reality drops away, you may well find yourself encountering in distorted fashion elements of your own reality that you have up to then studiously denied or ignored.
quotes.translation: 如果你告诉自己性感觉是错误的，并以此方式组织你的日常程序，那么当你“冥想”或放弃这种定向时，你可能会突然发现自己面对的是你认为不愉快的材料。你不能否认心灵实相，或你在肉身中体验到的那些自然感觉。当你开始改变你的感知，而你习惯性的实相图景消失时，你很可能会发现自己以扭曲的形式遇到了你之前刻意否认或忽视的自身实相元素。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You can readily see, therefore, how important your subjective feelings really are. This knowledge -- that your universe is idea construction -- can immediately give you clues that enable you to change your environment and circumstances beneficially. When you do not understand the nature of the soul, and do not realize that your thoughts and feelings form physical reality, then you feel powerless to change it. In later chapters of this book, I hope to give you some practical information that will enable you to alter practically the very nature and structure of daily life.
quotes.translation: 因此，你很容易看出你的主观感受有多么重要。这个认知——即你的宇宙是意念的建构——能立即给你线索，让你得以有益地改变你的环境和处境。当你不了解灵魂的本质，也不明白你的思想和感受形成了物质实相时，你就会感到无力改变它。在本书后面的章节中，我希望给你一些实用的信息，让你能够实际改变日常生活的本质和结构。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As creatures you are a part of nature. The change of thoughts, feelings and beliefs into physical, objectively perceived phenomena is as natural as water changing into ice, for example, or a caterpillar turning into a butterfly. You not only form the structure of your civilizations and social institutions through the transference of beliefs, thoughts and feelings; but in this natural exchange you also help on quite intimate levels in the "psychic manufacture" of the physical environment itself, with all of its great sweeping variety, and yet seasonal stability.
quotes.translation: 作为生物，你们是自然的一部分。思想、感受和信念转化为物质性的、客观感知的现象，就像水变成冰，或毛毛虫变成蝴蝶一样自然。你们不仅通过信念、思想和感受的转移形成了文明和社会制度的结构；在这种自然的交流中，你们还在非常亲密的层面上帮助了物质环境本身的“心灵制造”——这个环境既丰富多彩，又具有季节性的稳定性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As you understand the nature of natural hypnosis, you will no longer feel the need to generate new negative feelings. Your load of inhibitions will recede. As you trust yourself more you will naturally express your feelings, and their suppression will not bring about explosive reactions any more. They will come and go. The channel to power will be opened more clearly. Attention to your own stream of consciousness is highly important. This alone will help you see in what areas you are denying impulses or giving yourself directions that lead to powerlessness.
quotes.translation: 当你理解自然催眠的本质时，你将不再觉得有必要产生新的负面感受。你的抑制负担会消退。随着你更加信任自己，你会自然地表达你的感受，而它们的压抑将不再引发爆炸性的反应。它们会来来去去。通往力量的通道会更清晰地打开。关注你自己的意识流非常重要。仅此一点就能帮助你看到自己在哪些领域否认冲动，或给自己下达导致无力的指令。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If you have a physical symptom, do not run away from it. Feel its reality in your body. Let the emotions follow freely. These will lead you, if you allow them to flow, to the beliefs that cause the difficulty. They will take you through many aspects of your own reality that you must face and explore. These methods release your withheld natural aggressiveness. You may feel that you are swamped by emotion, but trust it -- again, it is the motion of your being, and it arouses your own creativity. Followed, it will seek the answers to your problems.
quotes.translation: 如果你有身体症状，不要逃避它。感受它在身体中的实相。让情绪自由跟随。如果你允许它们流动，它们会引导你找到导致困难的信念。它们会带你穿越你必须面对和探索的自身实相的许多方面。这些方法释放了你被压抑的自然攻击性。你可能会觉得自己被情绪淹没，但信任它——再说一次，它是你存在的运动，它激发了你自己的创造力。跟随它，它会寻找你问题的答案。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Dogmas or systems of thought that tell you to rise above your emotions can be misleading -- even, in your terms, somewhat dangerous. Such theories are based upon the concept that there is something innately disruptive, base, or wrong in man's emotional nature, while the soul is always depicted as being calm, "perfect," passive and unfeeling. Only the most lofty, blissful awareness is allowed. Yet the soul is above all a fountain of energy, creativity, and action that shows its characteristics in life precisely through the ever-changing emotions.
quotes.translation: 告诉你超越情绪的教条或思想体系可能会误导人——甚至，用你们的说法，有些危险。这类理论基于这样的概念：人类情感的本质中有某种天生具有破坏性、低劣或错误的东西，而灵魂则被描绘成平静、“完美”、被动且无感的。只有最崇高、极乐的觉知才被允许。然而，灵魂首先是能量、创造力和行动的源泉，它恰恰通过不断变化的情绪在生活中展现其特性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now. I have told you that emotions also possess an electrical reality. Thoughts formed and sent out within the impulse range of emotion often succeed because of the peculiar nature of emotional electrical impulses themselves. They have a particularly strong electrical mass. They also usually fall within powerful intensities. For reasons that we will not discuss, this evening, thoughts formed under a strong emotional impetus will carry greater vividness, have a greater tendency toward duplication, and are apt to be interpreted with some success.
quotes.translation: 现在。我告诉过你，情绪也拥有电性实相。在情绪的冲动范围内形成并发送出去的思想常常成功，这是因为情绪性电性冲动本身的特殊性质。它们具有特别强大的电性质量。它们通常也落在强大的强度范围内。出于我们今晚不讨论的原因，在强烈情绪推动下形成的思想会携带更大的生动性，有更强的复制倾向，并且容易被成功诠释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have also explained how energy is transformed, and changes, adapting itself to the particular camouflage pattern of any given plane. Now in these tests you will reach the inner self. The results will be, then, valid in physical terms. The emotions are the outer extensions of the inner senses, and it is therefore through the intuitions and traveling, the traveling of the pathways of the emotions, that you will come in contact with the inner self, and therefore be able to carry back this information in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 我也解释过能量如何转化与改变，以适应任何特定层面的伪装模式。在这些测试中，你将触及内在自我。其结果在物质层面同样有效。情绪是内在感官的外向延伸，因此正是通过直觉与情绪的路径之旅，你才能与内在自我接触，并得以用同样的方式带回这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The dream experience is felt directly by the inner self. Dreams have an electric actuality, as I have told you. In this electrical actuality they then exist independently of the dreamer, although he still applies the dream to himself. In the same manner do thoughts and emotions have the electric reality of which I have spoken. Therefore, within the electric system, dreams, thoughts and emotions exist as actualities, and in what you may call a tangible form, though not in the form of matter as you are familiar with it.
quotes.translation: 梦境体验由内在自我直接感受。如我曾告知，梦境具有电性实相。在这种电性实相中，它们独立于做梦者而存在，尽管做梦者仍将梦境归于自身。同样，思想与情绪也具备我所说的电性实相。因此，在电性系统内，梦境、思想与情绪作为实相存在，且以你们可称为有形的方式存在——尽管并非你们所熟悉的物质形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Experience is the product of the mind, the spirit, conscious thoughts and feelings, and unconscious thoughts and feelings. These together form the reality that you know. You are hardly at the mercy of a reality, therefore, that exists apart from yourself, or is thrust upon you. You are so intimately connected with the physical events composing your life experience that often you cannot distinguish between the seemingly material occurrences and the thoughts, expectations and desires that gave them birth.
quotes.translation: 体验是心智、灵性、意识思想与感受、无意识思想与感受的共同产物。这些共同构成了你所知的实相。你绝非受制于某种独立于你之外或强加于你的实相。你与构成生命体验的物质事件如此紧密相连，以至于常常无法区分看似物质性的发生，与赋予它们生命的那些思想、期待与渴望。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Emotion and imagination are being considered as far superior. The displaced powers of consciousness are still being assigned to the unconscious, and great efforts are being made to reach what seem to be normally inaccessible areas of awareness. To this end drugs are utilized, cults set up, and there are methods and training manuals galore. Period. Yet there is nothing basically inaccessible about such "inner knowledge or experience." It can all be quite conscious, and utilized to enrich the reality that you know. The conscious mind is not some prodigal child or poor relative of the self. It can quite freely focus into inner reality when you understand that it can. You, again, have a conscious mind. You can change the focus of your own consciousness.
quotes.translation: 情绪与想象力正被视作远为优越之物。被置换的意识能力仍被归入无意识领域，人们正竭力触及那些看似通常不可达的觉知领域。为此，药物被使用，教派被建立，方法与训练手册层出不穷。句号。然而，这类"内在知识或体验"本质上并无不可达之处。它们完全可以被意识所觉知，并用于丰富你所知的实相。意识心智并非自我的浪荡子或穷亲戚。当你理解它能够聚焦于内在实相时，它便能自由地做到这一点。再次强调，你拥有意识心智。你可以改变自身意识的焦点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: So does the personality, through negative charges, cause boundaries to be set about its own emotional system. It will accept most readily those thoughts and emotions, or electric actions, which attract it, which have a similarity to its own charged emotional climate; and it will have greater resistance to those which have the greatest dissimilarities. It is, therefore, most advantageous to study well those thoughts and emotions which are habitually accepted by any given personality.
quotes.translation: 人格同样通过负电荷，为其自身情绪系统设定边界。它会最轻易接受那些吸引它的、与其自身带电情绪氛围相似的思想与情绪（或电性活动）；而对那些差异最大的思想与情绪则具有最大抗拒。因此，仔细研究任何特定人格习惯性接受的那些思想与情绪，最为有利。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is, as a rule, lack of knowledge on the part of the ego as to the nature of reality, and its part in it, and the resulting fear, that often prevents a personality from accepting spontaneous expression of emotions in general. The capacity to feel is important. When one fears to experience seemingly unpleasant emotions, the personality also tends to set up an emotional pattern of rejection that seriously cuts down, also, not only on the expression but the very perception of joy.
quotes.translation: 通常，正是由于自我对实相本质及其在其中角色的无知，以及由此产生的恐惧，往往阻碍人格普遍接受情绪的自发表达。感受的能力至关重要。当一个人恐惧体验看似不愉快的情绪时，人格也倾向于建立一种排斥的情绪模式，这不仅严重削减了喜悦的表达，甚至削减了对喜悦的感知本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Various emotional factors within each personality cause what we may call a characteristic emotional climate. Certain types of thoughts and emotions are entertained therein. Since these are electrical actions, they set up strong electrical fields of attraction within the personality, easy electric paths. Uncharacteristic thoughts or emotions must then meet with some resistance. Habit, then, has not only a psychological, but an electrical and psychological nature and implication.
quotes.translation: 每个人格中的各种情感因素，造成了我们可称之为特征性的情绪氛围。某些特定类型的思维与情绪在其中被接纳。由于这些是电性活动，它们会在人格内部建立起强大的电性吸引场，形成顺畅的电性路径。非特征性的思维或情绪则必须面对某种阻力。因此，习惯不仅具有心理性，还具有电性与心理性的本质与意涵。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You often avoid this natural treatment, however, and run from frightening conscious thoughts that would in their turn lead you to the source of "negative" beliefs, where they could be faced; you could then travel through them, so to speak, into feelings of joy and victory. Instead, for example, many of you accept the way of drugs, where such feelings and thoughts are thrust upon you, or forced out of you while you are denied the stabilizing comforts of the conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 然而，你们常常回避这种自然疗法，逃离那些令人恐惧的显意识念头——这些念头本会引导你们找到"负面"信念的源头，使你们得以面对它们；你们本可穿越它们，可以说，进入喜悦与胜利的感受。相反，例如你们许多人接受药物之道，让这类感受与思维被强加于己，或被驱离体外，同时却被剥夺了显意识心智的稳定慰藉。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I spoke in a recent session concerning the connection between distance and emotions. The true reality of distance as you know it is dependent upon the intensity of emotion, and has nothing to do with your idea of space. The emotion which is intense is felt at its peak as present in time, and immediately here in terms of distance.
quotes.translation: 在近期的一堂课中，我谈到了距离与情绪之间的关联。你们所知距离的真实性，取决于情绪的强度，与你们对空间的概念毫无关系。强烈的情绪在其巅峰时刻被感知为当下存在，就距离而言则立即在此处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: The feelings and sensations give rise to the questions, to the thoughts, to the intellect. The child in a fashion feels -- feels -- its own thoughts rise from a relative psychological invisibility into immediate, vital formation. There is a process there that you have forgotten. The child identifies with its own psychic reality first of all -- then discovers its feelings, and claims those, and discovers its thoughts and intellect, and claims those (all quite intently).
quotes.translation: 感受与感觉引发了问题、思维与智性。孩童以某种方式感受——感受——自己的思维从相对的心理不可见性，跃入即刻的、生动的成形。那里有一个你们已遗忘的过程。孩童首先认同自己的心灵实相——然后发现自己的感受，并认领它们，再发现自己的思维与智性，并认领它们（全都相当专注地）。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: You made a witty and somewhat frivolous comment, my dear Joseph, during your lengthy period of rest. It should lead you to understand human nature to a better degree than before. If women feel like mothering their husbands or lovers, if men find themselves occasionally amazed, alternating between feelings of sexual love, paternal affection and even boyish pride, as far as their own wives are concerned, now you can see why these feelings are so natural and inevitable.
quotes.translation: 我亲爱的约瑟，在你漫长的休息期间，你做了一个机智而略带轻浮的评论。这应能引导你比以前更好地理解人性。如果女性感觉想要像母亲般呵护丈夫或情人，如果男性发现自己偶尔感到惊奇，在性爱、父爱甚至男孩般的骄傲之间交替——就他们自己的妻子而言——现在你就能明白为何这些感受如此自然且不可避免。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: （Peggy Gallagher has been bothered in recent weeks by what she calls bursitis in her left shoulder. In the last few days the discomfort has moved down into her left arm; periodically she said the arm tingles, in a sensation similar to that felt when a limb has gone to sleep. The feeling is not that drastic though. Seth, without being asked, told Peggy that she had a disturbance in the area of the third to fifth vertebrae, and that this, basically, was the cause of her back and arm disturbances. Peggy had thought circulation was at the seat of the trouble. Seth said the circulation was healthy, but interfered with somewhat by tension.
quotes.translation: （佩吉·加拉格尔近几周被她所谓的左肩滑囊炎所困扰。过去几天，不适感已向下蔓延至左臂；她表示手臂会间歇性刺痛，感觉类似肢体麻木时的感受，但没那么剧烈。赛斯未待询问便告诉佩吉，她的第三至第五节脊椎区域存在紊乱，而这正是她背部和手臂不适的根本原因。佩吉原以为血液循环是问题所在。赛斯表示血液循环健康，但受到紧张情绪的些许干扰。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: These suggestions should suffice if followed. By all means, as you suggested, a complete honesty of feelings should be admitted. The swearing when he drinks is a direct result of the fact that he tries to deny aggressive feelings otherwise. The garden should be begun as an outlet, and a creative one, for aggressive feelings.
quotes.translation: 若遵循这些建议，它们应已足够。无论如何，如你所建议，应完全坦诚地承认感受。他饮酒时咒骂，直接源于他试图否认攻击性感受。花园应作为宣泄渠道，且是创造性的，用于处理攻击性感受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json
