quotes.text: The image is tied up with certain emotions usually connected with the institution of marriage, and with being a respectable breadwinner and a father. You have not completely introduced your inner image, but only hinted at it, so that to her it is secondary and unreal, when she is faced by actual events in which you behave as the inner image, she is bewildered, confused, and imagines that you are demented.
quotes.translation: 这个意象与通常关联婚姻制度的情感紧密相连，也与成为体面养家者和父亲的身份相关。你尚未完全展现内在意象，只是隐约暗示，以致于对她而言这显得次要且不真实。当她面对你实际行为与内在意象相符的现实事件时，会感到困惑迷惘，甚至以为你精神失常。

quotes.text: It will be easier （i.e., there will be less resistance; put that in parentheses） for a given individual to accept certain ideas or emotions therefore, and more difficult for him to accept certain others. I have spoken about fields and systems. While no system is closed, each system has at its furthest reaches sufficient resistance to form sufficient-enough boundaries, so that its own identity is retained.
quotes.translation: 因此，特定个体接受某些观念或情绪会更容易（即阻力较小，请将此句置于括号内），而接受其他观念则更困难。我曾谈及场域与系统。虽然系统并非封闭，但每个系统在其最远端都具备足够阻力形成充分边界，从而维持自身特性。

quotes.text: Other dream events, though forgotten, may also cushion the individual to withstand the effects of such "nightmare therapy." In the same way that some LSD treatment finally results in a feeling of rebirth (that is often only temporary, however), so a period of such nightmares often leads quite naturally to dreams in which the self finally makes new and greater connections with the source of its own being.
quotes.translation: 其他梦境事件即便被遗忘，也可能缓冲个体承受此类"噩梦疗法"的冲击。正如某些LSD治疗最终会带来重生感（尽管往往只是暂时），一段时期的噩梦也常自然引导至这样的梦境：自我最终与自身存在本源建立崭新而更宏大的联结。

quotes.text: "This is almost always an exhilarating experience, like riding some perfect gigantic ninth wave of energy, knowing exactly how and when to 'jump in', and feeling absolutely safe and supported even when embarked upon such a strange psychological flight. But the energy and power of this wave carries me above and below usual reality, sweeping me into contrasts that are microscopic and macroscopic by turns."
quotes.translation: "这几乎总是令人振奋的体验，如同驾驭某道完美的第九重能量巨浪，精确知晓何时及如何'跃入'，即便踏上如此奇异的心理飞行，仍感到绝对安全与支撑。但这道浪的能量与力量将我托举至寻常现实之上又沉入其下，交替卷入微观与宏观的对比之中。"

quotes.text: Those involved in such disasters -- the survivors -- often use such "larger-than-life" circumstances in order to participate in affairs that seem to have greater import than those possessed by previous humdrum existences. They seek the excitement, whatever its consequences. They become a part of history to whatever extent. For once their private lives are identified with a greater source -- and from it many derive new strength and vitality. Social barriers are dropped, economic positions forgotten. The range of private emotions is given greater, fuller, sweep.
quotes.translation: 那些卷入此类灾难的幸存者，常利用这些"超乎寻常"的情境，去参与那些看似比先前平淡无奇的生活更具重大意义的事件。他们寻求刺激，无论后果如何。他们在某种程度上成为历史的一部分。他们的私生活终于与一个更伟大的源头相连——许多人从中获得了新的力量与活力。社会藩篱被打破，经济地位被遗忘。私人情感的范畴得到了更广阔、更充分的展现。

quotes.text: Each individual is not at the same level of achievement even at the end of the reincarnational cycle. Some possess certain qualities that do not find a counterpart within human experience. Physical existence itself has a different effect upon various individuals. Some find it an excellent medium of expression and development. They are suited to it. They have the knack for expressing themselves in physical ways and objectifying inner feelings faithfully. Others find this difficult, and yet these same individuals may do much better in other levels of reality.
quotes.translation: 即使到了轮回周期的终点，每个人的成就层次也各不相同。有些人拥有某些在人类经验中找不到对应物的特质。物质实相对不同个体产生不同影响。有些人发现它是表达与发展的绝佳媒介，他们天生适合于此，擅长以物质方式表达自己，忠实地将内在感受客观化。另一些人则发现这很困难，然而这些人在其他实相层次上可能表现得更好。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: All matter is based upon the units mentioned, with their unpredictability and their propensity for exploring all probabilities. Even your atomic structure, then, is poised between probabilities. If this is true, then obviously "you" are aware of only one small probable portion of yourself -- and this portion you protect as your identity (underlined). If you think of it as simply a focus taken by "your" greater identity, then you will be able to follow what I am saying without feeling puny by contrast, or lost.6 The focus that you have is indeed inviolate.
quotes.translation: 所有物质都基于前述的单元，它们具有不可预测性以及探索所有可能性的倾向。因此，即使你们的原子结构也悬于可能性之间。如果真是如此，那么显然"你"只意识到自己一小部分可能的身份——而你保护着这一部分，视之为你的身份（划线强调）。如果你将其视为"你"更伟大身份所采取的一个焦点，那么你就能理解我所说的话，而不会因对比而感到渺小或迷失。你所拥有的这个焦点确实是不可侵犯的。

quotes.text: In a highly materialistic society, the loss of an expensive home and other material possessions is a matter of great practical and symbolic nature. Many individuals therefore sought out that experience. (Long pause.) Many also found themselves reacting with a heroism they did not realize they possessed. A sense of community unity was born, a deep feeling of companionship that had not existed earlier.
quotes.translation: 在一个高度物质主义的社会中，失去昂贵的住宅和其他物质财产，具有重大的实际和象征意义。因此许多人寻求这种体验。（长停顿。）许多人还发现自己表现出未曾意识到的英雄气概。一种社区团结感诞生了，一种先前不存在的深厚情谊油然而生。

quotes.text: His needs that I have spoken of are really fears, which is why I took so much time to discuss them. He is unpredictable in that he is temperamentally good-natured, but you never know when the rocks will fly, and neither does he. Added to this is his strong domestic feelings now as a woman; and this, my dear Joseph, explains the incredible amount of furniture movings in which you have been involved.
quotes.translation: 我所说的他的需求，其实是恐惧，这就是为什么我花了这么多时间讨论它们。他之所以不可预测，是因为他性情温和，但你永远不知道石头何时会飞起，他自己也不知道。再加上他现在作为女性所具有的强烈家庭情感；这，我亲爱的约瑟夫，解释了你所卷入的难以置信的大量家具搬动。

Any of these occurrences can be hints that you are beginning to glimpse the probable variations of the particular scene or action. It is, however, the subjective feeling that is the important clue here, and once you experience it there will be no doubt in your mind.

quotes.text: In your present system of beliefs, and with the dubious light in which the unconscious is considered, a fear of the emotions is often generated. Not only are they often hindered in waking life, then, but censored as much as possible in dreams. Their expression becomes very difficult; great blockages of energy occur, which in your terms can result in neurotic or even stronger, psychotic, behavior.
quotes.translation: 在你们当前的信念体系及对无意识的暧昧认知中，常滋生对情绪的恐惧。不仅清醒时情绪常受压抑，梦境中亦尽可能被审查。情绪表达变得极为困难，导致巨大能量阻塞，按你们的话说，可能引发神经质乃至更严重的精神病态行为。

quotes.text: The decision is your own according to your understanding. You cannot be hounded from one level of reality to another by a fear that you do not understand. You cannot be threatened in this life by fears from your early childhood, or by so-called past existences, unless you so thoroughly believe in the nature of fear that you allow yourselves to be conquered by it. Each of your personalities are free to accept and develop, from the miraculous banks of reality, those experiences and emotions that you want, and to reject those you do not want.
quotes.translation: 决定权在你们自己，取决于你们的理解。你们不会因不明所以的恐惧而被逐出某个实相层面。除非你们彻底相信恐惧的本质而甘愿被其征服，否则此生不会受童年早期恐惧或所谓前世经历的威胁。每个个体皆可自由地从实相的神奇宝库中，选择并发展那些你们想要的经验与情绪，拒绝那些不想要的。

quotes.translation: 鲁柏说得对：那张在前院山坡上（由友人拍摄）的照片，如实呈现了你们对山坡房屋与土地的态度。鲁柏虽不擅运动，却始终热爱自然。这栋房屋与庭园将让你们重拾他曾遗弃的旧日感受，某种程度上复苏他一度视为自然的"清新空气"意象。

quotes.text: Women whose husbands have had vasectomies have themselves often resolved sexual problems that have bothered them. Fear is reduced in that area. (Long pause.) Cervical cancer can involve -- can involve -- distortions of the growth process itself, because of the complicated distortions of belief on the woman's part. In a way the very pain of cancer -- of some cancers -- often acts through its intensity as a reflection of the person's belief that life is painful, tormenting. At the same time, the pain is a reminder of feeling and sensation.
quotes.translation: 丈夫接受输精管结扎术的妇女，常自行解决了困扰她们的性问题。该领域的恐惧得以减轻。（长停顿。）子宫颈癌可能涉及——可能涉及——生长过程本身的扭曲，源于女性自身信念的复杂扭曲。某种程度上，某些癌症的剧痛常以其强度反映当事人"生命即痛苦折磨"的信念。同时，疼痛也是对感受与知觉的提醒。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I have mentioned before that many people have had cancer and recovered without knowing it. In your belief system, however, it is almost imperative to see a doctor in such circumstances (as Jane wrote in Note 2 for Session 805), for many fears are unsubstantiated, and the fear alone, found groundless, gives the person new life symbolically and physically.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: There are brain formations, not materialized in physical form. Sensations are perceptions; emotions perceived in terms of color, and directly in terms of intensities. There is no direct relation here to your own system at all, except of course that all systems are ultimately connected. The inverted time system results in a different sequence of experience than that with which you are acquainted.
quotes.translation: 存在一些大脑结构，但并未以物质形态显化。感觉即是感知；情绪以色彩的形式被感知，并直接以强度来度量。这与你们的系统毫无直接关联，当然，所有系统最终都是相连的。倒置的时间系统导致体验的顺序与你们所熟悉的不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You must remember, of course, that the use of clocks is a fairly recent phenomenon. (Pause.) Men thought in terms of rhythms of the time, or of flowing time, not of time in sections that were arbitrary. So as far as creaturehood is concerned, you have adapted to a time environment that you yourselves have formed. Creative people, again, are often aware of those connections, at least at certain levels, and Ruburt in particular has always felt that way to some extent. You have largely buried your own natural feelings in that direction.
quotes.translation: 当然，你们必须记住，时钟的使用是相当晚近的现象。（停顿。）人类曾以时间的韵律或流动的时间来思考，而非将时间分割成任意片段。因此，就生物性而言，你们已经适应了自己所创造的时间环境。有创造力的人往往至少在某些层面上能意识到这些关联，而鲁柏尤其一直有这种感觉。你们在很大程度上埋没了自己在这方面的自然感受。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: Do not be impatient. As you continue with this exercise over a period of time you will be able to go further away, orienting yourself as you grow more familiar with the feeling of your mind. Gradually you will discover that this inner sense data will become clearer and clearer as you move toward another "station." It will represent reality as perceived from a different state of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 不要急躁。随着你持续进行这个练习一段时间，你将能够走得更远，当你越来越熟悉自己心灵的感觉时，就能为自己定位。渐渐地，你会发现，当你移向另一个"站点"时，这种内在感官数据会变得越来越清晰。它将代表从不同意识状态所感知到的实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It did not occur to him that those experiences had anything to do with this book, or that in acting so spontaneously he was following any kind of inner order. He wanted these pages to follow neatly one by one. Each of his experiences, however, demonstrates the ways in which the psyche's direct experiences defy your prosaic concepts of time, reality, and the orderly sequence of events. They also served to point up the differences between knowledge and comprehension, and emphasize the importance of desire and of the emotions.
quotes.translation: 他从未想过这些体验与这本书有任何关联，也未曾意识到如此自发地行动是在遵循某种内在秩序。他希望这些页面能一页接一页地整齐排列。然而，他的每一个体验都展示了心灵直接体验如何挑战你们对时间、实相以及事件有序序列的平淡概念。它们也凸显了知识与理解之间的差异，并强调了渴望与情绪的重要性。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You operate quite nicely politically, living in villages, townships, countries, states, and so forth, each with certain customs and local ordinances. These in no way affect the land itself. They are designations for practical purposes, and they imply organization of intent or affiliation at one level. They are political patterns, invisible but highly effective. There are, however, far more vigorous invisible mental patterns, into which the thoughts and feelings of mankind are organized -- or, naturally, organize themselves.
quotes.translation: 你们在政治上运作得相当不错，生活在村庄、乡镇、国家、州等之中，每个地方都有特定的习俗和地方法规。这些丝毫不会影响土地本身。它们是为了实用目的而设定的名称，并在某一层面上暗示了意图或归属的组织。它们是政治模式，无形却极为有效。然而，存在着更为活跃的无形心智模式，人类的思想和情感在其中被组织——或者，自然地，自行组织。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 803, MAY 2, 1977
9:43 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You will recall that the ego, while disliking change, is nevertheless dependent for its identity upon change. The ego to a large degree, therefore, chooses during its development those characteristic actions which will form its nature. Because the ego necessarily changes however, actions or emotions which at one time it chose as acceptable, at a later date so to speak it may attempt to deny.
quotes.translation: 你会记得，自我虽然不喜欢改变，但其身份认同却依赖于改变。因此，自我在其发展过程中，很大程度上会选择那些将塑造其本质的特征性行动。然而，由于自我必然会改变，那些它一度认为可以接受的行为或情绪，在日后，可以说，它可能会试图否认。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your beliefs automatically attract the appropriate emotions. They reinforce themselves through imagination; and at the risk of repeating myself, because this is so important: Imagination and feeling follow your beliefs. It is not the other way around.
quotes.translation: 你的信念会自动吸引相应的情绪。它们通过想象力强化自身——容我重复，因为这至关重要：想象力和感受追随你的信念，而非相反。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You are biologically connected, chemically connected with the earth that you know; but since it is also formed naturally and spontaneously from your own projected psychic energy, since you and the seasons even have a psychic interaction, then the self must be understood in a far greater context. Such a context would allow you to share in life experiences of many other forms, to follow patterns of energy and emotion of which you barely conceive, and to sense a world-consciousness in which you have your own independent part.
quotes.translation: 你在生物学上与地球相连，在化学上与地球相连；但由于地球也自然自发地形成于你投射的心灵能量，由于你与季节甚至存在心灵互动，因此必须在更广阔的脉络中理解自我。这样的脉络将允许你分享其他生命形式的存在经验，追随你几乎无法想象的能量与情感模式，并感知一种你拥有独立角色的世界意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now I understand that to one closely and daily involved with the woman, it is difficult to see purpose or reason in the condition. Since the egotistical knowledge of the woman does not include this data, there are of course difficulties here also. But the inner self of the woman knows that in facing such a condition and finding nevertheless some moments of joy, even some compassion for others, that the personality has satisfied many of those feelings of inadequacy from the past existence. (One minute pause, eyes closed.)
quotes.translation: 我明白，对于每日与这位女士密切相处的人来说，很难看出这种状况的目的或理由。由于这位女士的自我认知并不包含这些数据，这里当然也存在困难。但她的内在自我知道，在直面这种状况时仍能寻得片刻欢愉，甚至对他人怀有慈悲，这已让此人格满足了前世许多关于不足的感受。（闭目停顿一分钟）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These are my instructions. You may consider this your first lesson. We will go by easy stages, for we do not want you betwixt and between. You may induce a medium trance in whatever way you choose. On occasion this will be spontaneous, as you know. For best results in the beginning it is good to make a projection attempt when you already feel physically drowsy, but pleasantly so. When you have induced the trance state, then begin to examine your own subjective feelings until you find recognition of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这些是我的指示。你可以将此视为第一课。我们将循序渐进，因为我们不想让你处于模棱两可的状态。你可以选择任何方式诱导中等出神状态。如你所知，有时这会自然发生。初期最佳效果是在你已感到身体困倦但愉悦时进行投射尝试。当你进入出神状态后，开始检视自己的主观感受，直到认出内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: What you have here is an attempt to objectify, or stand apart from action in such a refusal. This is not the fault of the subconscious, but a fault of the ego, which refuses to assimilate or accept a given action. As you know, it is the ego who exists as a result of such objectivity. All the qualities that make up the ego are objectified to that degree, but they are collected about the ego with the ego as center. When the ego however refuses to accept an emotion as a part of itself, it tries one of two actions.
quotes.translation: 你在此处所做的，正是试图将行动客观化，或通过这种拒绝与行动分离。这不是潜意识的过错，而是自我的过错——它拒绝同化或接纳特定行动。如你所知，正是这种客观化造就了自我的存在。构成自我的所有特质都被客观化到那个程度，但它们以自我为中心聚集。然而当自我拒绝接纳某种情绪作为自身一部分时，它会尝试两种行动之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When I speak of the electrical universe, indeed this represents but one more facet of reality. But all of these universes are indeed one. You remember our discussion concerning density of intensities. Here is the secret, if you could but see it: Even though the electrical universe might seem to you far divorced from what you know, nevertheless you dwell within it. Your own emotions have an independent existence within it. And your own possibilities within it are unlimited. But even this is also a camouflage.
quotes.translation: 当我谈及电性宇宙时，这确实只是实相的另一个面向。但所有这些宇宙实为一体。你记得我们关于强度密度的讨论吗？这里藏着秘密，若你能看透：即便电性宇宙看似与你所知的世界相去甚远，你仍栖身其中。你的情绪在其中拥有独立存在，而你在其中的可能性是无限的。但即便如此，这也是一种幻相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Take for example this subconscious feeling: "I want to be comforted. If I were sick someone would feel sorry for me and comfort me then." Such a wish is very seldom on a conscious level, but it is often Emotionally charged, and it brings forth immediate results because of the charge it carries. Whenever you catch yourselves in Moods of self pity, then you are courting just such results.
quotes.translation: 以这个潜意识感受为例："我想要被安慰。如果我生病了，就会有人同情我并安慰我。"这种愿望很少出现在意识层面，但往往带有强烈的情感负荷，正是由于这种负荷，它会立即产生结果。每当你陷入自怜的情绪时，你就是在招致这样的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You will accept your present position, whatever it is, as being a part of that direction, and realize that from it can come all the creative elements that you need. Being yourself and trusting in your own integrity, you will automatically help others. It does little good to repeat a suggestion such as, "I am a worthy person. I trust myself and my integrity," if at the same time you are afraid of your own emotions and become upset whenever you catch yourself in what you think of as a negative frame of mind.
quotes.translation: 无论你目前的处境如何，你都会接受它作为那个方向的一部分，并认识到从中可以产生你所需的一切创造性元素。做你自己，信任自己的完整性，你自然会帮助他人。如果你同时害怕自己的情绪，每当发现自己处于你认为的负面心态时就感到不安，那么重复诸如"我是一个有价值的人。我信任自己和自己的完整性"这样的暗示收效甚微。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Such a practice leads to feelings of helplessness and hopelessness, in which effective action seems impossible. Life possesses an exuberance. If this is cherished, nurtured, encouraged, then additional energy is generated that is not needed for the purposes of daily private life -- a superabundance, that can be effectively directed in those areas of the world where help is most needed.
quotes.translation: 这种做法会导致无助和绝望的感觉，在这种感觉中，有效的行动似乎是不可能的。生命充满活力。如果这种活力被珍惜、培育和鼓励，那么就会产生额外的能量，这些能量并非日常私人生活所需——这是一种过剩的能量，可以有效地引导到世界上最需要帮助的领域。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "To the cat this is an experience. There is some additional implication, in that he picked up your joint feelings about your friend David--but that is not the cause, simply an added coloration. The give-and-take of weather conditions and animal behavior is little understood. Your other cat, for example, reacted in an opposite fashion, actively providing herself with additional stimuli.
quotes.translation: "对猫来说，这是一种体验。还有额外的含义，因为它捕捉到了你们对朋友大卫的共同感受——但这并非原因，只是增添了一层色彩。天气状况与动物行为之间的相互作用鲜为人知。例如，你的另一只猫以相反的方式反应，主动为自己提供额外的刺激。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each species is involved in a cooperative venture, upon which ultimately all earthly existence rests. You project your present beliefs backward into history, and you misinterpret many of the conditions that you observe in the natural world. This cooperation that I speak of is based on love, and that love has a biological as well as a spiritual basis. Your beliefs, for example, cause you to deny the existence of emotions in animals, and any instances of love among them are assigned to "blind" instinct.
quotes.translation: 每个物种都参与一项合作事业，所有地球上的生命最终都依赖于它。你将当前的信念投射到历史中，并误解了你在自然世界中观察到的许多情况。我所说的这种合作基于爱，这种爱既有生物学基础，也有灵性基础。例如，你的信念导致你否认动物存在情感，并将它们之间的任何爱的实例归因于"盲目的"本能。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I did not realize that this particular experience would occur so early. It actually represents an amazing ability to focus the complete inner energy. In other words, to command and focus the entire amount of energy inherent within the personality from the inner universe, and as such it must be used with discretion and discipline. It should never be allowed to be used for the purposes of the emotions belonging to the outer ego.
quotes.translation: 我没有意识到这次特定的体验会如此早地发生。它实际上代表了一种惊人的能力，能够聚焦全部的内在能量。换句话说，能够指挥并聚焦内在宇宙中人格所固有的全部能量，因此必须谨慎而有纪律地使用它。绝不允许它被用于属于外在自我的情绪目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are some things that I do not believe you clearly understand. To me, a thought is an action. It is as valid a reality. There is no basic difference between telepathy and clairvoyance, as you term them. The Emotional feelings connected with an item are as real to me as the item itself. It is these Emotional charges that are interpreted, and finally translated into physical terms.
quotes.translation: 有些事我相信你并不清楚。对我而言，思想即是行动，它同样是一种真实的实相。你们所谓的心灵感应与千里眼之间并无本质区别。与某事物相关的情感感受对我而言与该事物本身同样真实。正是这些情感电荷被解读，并最终转化为物质形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Again this is reflected in the way you drive your car. Now, the difficulties arising from your relationship with your father also gave you other beneficial effects. This feeling is somewhat responsible for your success as a teacher, for example. For you are then in authority, and you would, if you could, drive your students as you drive your car and force them to go 85 miles a minute.
quotes.translation: 这再次反映在你驾驶汽车的方式上。现在，你与父亲关系产生的困难也给你带来了其他益处。例如，这种感受某种程度上促成了你作为教师的成功。因为那时你处于权威地位，你会尽可能像开车那样驱使你的学生，强迫他们以每分钟85英里的速度前进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: Being your own natural and magical self when you dream, you utilize information that is outside of the time context experienced by the so-called rational mind. The creative abilities operate in the same fashion, appearing within consecutive time, but with the main work done outside of it entirely. When you finished your project,4 you had several days of feeling miserable, but you caught yourself and turned yourself around beautifully, and you have every right to congratulate yourself in that regard.
quotes.translation: 当你做梦时，作为你自然且神奇的自我，你运用了所谓理性心智所经历的时间脉络之外的信息。创造力以同样的方式运作，出现在连续的时间中，但主要工作却完全在时间之外完成。当你完成你的项目后，你经历了几天痛苦的感觉，但你及时调整了自己并漂亮地扭转了局面，在这方面你完全有理由祝贺自己。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The particular atmosphere surrounding your personalities just prior to the animals' deaths was destructive, short-circuited and filled with inner panics. I do not want to hurt your feelings. This is, I am sorry to say, a natural occurrence on your plane. The fact is that the animals caught your emotional contagion, and according to their lesser abilities translated it for themselves.
quotes.translation: 动物死亡前你们人格周围的特定氛围具有破坏性、短路且充满内在恐慌。我不想伤害你的感情。很遗憾，这在你们层面是自然发生的事。事实是动物感染了你们的情感传染，并根据它们较低的能力将其转化为自己的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. In this existence, when you see a picture in your mind, and when there is strong emotion and vivid desire behind it, it will be constructed. There will be a time lapse within this system, but in other systems there may be no time lapse... and your thought may be instantly transposed into reality. Therefore, now you must learn the nature of your thoughts and how to handle energy.
quotes.translation: 现在。在这个存在中，当你在脑海中看到一幅画面，并且背后有强烈的情感和生动的渴望时，它将被构建出来。在这个系统内会有时间延迟，但在其他系统中可能没有时间延迟...你的思想可能瞬间转化为实相。因此，现在你必须学习你思想的本质以及如何处理能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: To get in direct contact with your own feelings as they are, comma, again make up your own spontaneous sounds sometimes. Your emotions often cannot be expressed clearly in terms of language, and such unpatterning can allow them to flow freely.
quotes.translation: 要直接接触你当下的感受，逗号，有时再次发出你自发的声响。你的情绪往往无法用语言清晰表达，而这样的非模式化可以让它们自由流动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 723
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The traveling consciousness as you know it often experiences the feeling of motion and movement through space. This is because there is still translation through the physical senses. You are moving more effectively within camouflage reality, but you are still dealing with it. The focus of your attention has changed somewhat, but you are still strongly relating to the physical field.
quotes.translation: 你所知的旅行意识经常体验到穿越空间的运动感。这是因为仍存在通过物质感官的转译。你在伪装实相中移动得更有效率，但你仍在与之打交道。你的注意力焦点已有所改变，但你仍与物质场域紧密相连。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Therefore, within this context you trust treat your living things gently. They are actualities within your system. Philosophical tenets at your level must be carefully filled in by constructive Emotions. There is strong value fulfillment to be gained where you are. It is good to know where you are, and the nature of your reality. You must still operate within its framework, however.
quotes.translation: 因此，在此脉络下，你应温柔对待你的生命体。它们是你系统内的实相。在你这个层面的哲学信条必须由建设性的情感仔细填补。在你所在之处有强烈的价值完成可获。了解你身在何处以及你实相的本质是好的。然而，你仍必须在其架构内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Sorrow or fear obviously show different faces--not only (long pause), the anatomy and the structure [that] forms the living face, but the emotions within that give the muscles and the structures meaning, and that play upon them. You want the force that feels the form and so the figure must indeed dominate the painting, as the force within must fill and move within the figure itself.
quotes.translation: 悲伤或恐惧显然展现出不同的面貌——不仅（长停顿）构成活生生面孔的解剖结构与构造，还有赋予肌肉与结构意义并作用于其上的内在情感。你想要那股感受形态的力量，因此形体必须确实主导画作，正如内在的力量必须充满并活动于形体本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: At certain levels these intents of man and nature may merge. I am speaking in very simple terms now, and yet those involved in a flood, for example, want the past washed away, or want to be flooded by bursts of vital emotions such as disasters often bring. They want to feel a renewed sense of nature's power, and often, though devastated, they use the experience to start a new life.
quotes.translation: 在某些层面，人类与自然的意图可能融合。我现在用非常简单的术语说明，例如，那些遭遇洪水的人希望过去被冲刷干净，或希望被灾难常带来的强烈情感洪流所淹没。他们想要重新感受自然力量，尽管常遭重创，他们仍利用这经验开启新生活。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The technique can follow beautifully through as a handmaiden of the intuitions. The technique can be channels of line through which feeling may flow. (Long pause.) Let the medium and technique follow naturally from the original vision. Allow the vision then to take its own form. But do not impose (underlined) a form upon it. Then this fine technique will be truly used to advantage.
quotes.translation: 技巧可以优美地作为直觉的侍女。技巧可以成为情感流动的线条渠道。（长停顿。）让媒介与技巧自然跟随最初的愿景。然后允许愿景采取它自己的形式。但不要将形式强加（强调）于其上。这样精妙的技巧才会被真正善用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: (11:03.) Your true feeling toward relatives who are also dead will be known to you and to them. There is no hypocrisy. You do not pretend to love a parent who did little to earn your respect or love. Telepathy operates without distortion in this after-death period, so you must deal with the true relationships that exist between yourself and all relatives and friends who await you.
quotes.translation: （11:03分）你对已故亲属的真实感受，你自己与他们都会知晓。没有虚伪。你不必假装爱一个未曾赢得你尊重或爱的父母。在此死后阶段，心电感应毫无扭曲地运作，因此你必须处理你与所有等待你的亲友之间存在的真实关系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each individual must examine his or her individual beliefs, or begin with feelings which will inevitably lead to them. In this area, as in all others, those of you who are proficient verbally might use the method of writing. Either write down your beliefs as they come to you, or make lists of your intellectual and emotional assumptions. You may find that they are quite different.
quotes.translation: 每个人必须检视自己的个人信念，或从感受入手，这些感受终将引导至信念。在此领域，如同其他领域，擅长文字表达者可采用书写方式。或随手记下浮现的信念，或列出理智与情感的假设清单。你可能会发现两者大相径庭。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This characteristic of materializing thoughts and emotions into physical realities is an attribute of the soul. Now in your reality, these thoughts are made physical. In other realities, they may be "constructed" in an entirely different fashion. So your soul, that which you are, constructs your physical daily reality for you from the nature of your thoughts and expectations.
quotes.translation: 将思想与情感物质化为具体实相的特性，是灵魂的本质。在你们的实相中，这些思想被转化为物质形态。而在其他实相中，它们可能以截然不同的方式被"构建"。因此，你的灵魂——即你的本质——根据你思想与期待的特质，为你构建出日常的物质实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I do feel that part of that enrichment involves a worldwide (and possibly universal) healing action, contributed to by each living form--that here on earth, at least, this vital force of our own creation sustains us in an unending grand synthesis of regeneration. Yet I haven't read anything about this, at least put in just this way. Our species should study the whole subject of global healing, so that it can use the knowledge gained to lead itself into new areas of thought and feeling.
quotes.translation: 我确实感到，这种丰盛的一部分涉及一场全球性（甚至可能是宇宙性）的疗愈行动，每个生命形态都在其中贡献力量——至少在地球上，我们自身创造的生命力以永无止境的再生大融合滋养着我们。然而我从未读到过相关论述，至少未见过如此表述。人类物种应当研究全球疗愈的完整课题，以便运用所得知识，引领自身进入思想与情感的新领域。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: "Seth used Session 909 as a bridge between chapters 6 and 7 in Dreams. This means that now the session serves as a connective--a very effective lure, say--between volumes 1 and 2. Indeed, in retrospect it almost seems as though Seth, that 'energy personality essence,' planned it that way! And Jane and I look forward with intense interest to the final version of Dreams, for as always this work will be as revealing and educational for us as it will be for anybody else. I thank each reader for his or her patience in accepting the publication of Dreams in two volumes."

quotes.text: If someone is caught in a natural disaster, the following questions might be asked: "Am I being punished by God, and for what reason? Is the disaster the result of God's vengeance?" A scientist might ask instead: "With better technology and information, could we somehow have predicted the disaster, and saved many lives?" He might try to dissociate himself from emotion, and to see the disaster simply as the result of a nonpersonal nature that did not know or care what lay in its path.
quotes.translation: 若有人遭遇自然灾害，可能会追问："我是否正受上帝惩罚？因何缘由？这场灾难是上帝报复的结果吗？"而科学家或许会问："凭借更先进的技术与信息，我们能否提前预测灾难，挽救更多生命？"他可能试图抽离情感，将灾难仅视为无觉知的非人格化自然现象——它既不知晓，也不在乎前方有何存在。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: eth's statement at the end of dictation for the 815th session, "I will try to begin work on our book in a more predictable fashion," reflected his good intent, but things didn't turn out that way. Jane and I let the holiday season intervene to some extent, and Session 816, which came through the day after Christmas, didn't concern book work at all. Then, starting in early January, we held eight sessions having to do with questions we'd put off dealing with for a long time; some were personal and some were not. We stayed with our Monday-Saturday evening session routine, though, and kept busy with all of our other projects.1
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: He did not want her to read the book, you see. He felt this left him open. His expectations, in other words, caused the attack, unfortunately. These feelings began when the book was definitely accepted. They did not grow into such actual disproportionate terms until the time of actual showing arrived.
quotes.translation: 你看，他并不希望她阅读那本书。他感到这会让他暴露无遗。换言之，他的期待不幸引发了这场攻击。这些感受自书籍被明确接纳时便已萌生，直到实际展示时刻来临，才膨胀至如此不成比例的程度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (Deliberately:) Imagination and emotions are the most concentrated forms of energy that you possess as physical creatures. Any strong emotion carries within it far more energy than, say, that required to send a rocket to the moon.
quotes.translation: （刻意地：）想象力与情感，是你们作为物质生物所拥有的最浓缩的能量形式。任何强烈情感所蕴含的能量，都远超将火箭送上月球所需。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Actually the three sets of events could easily occur to the three people at once, and if no normal communication happened no one would be the wiser. The inner tapestry of events deals with just this kind of association. Emotional intensities and significances compose the nature of events. In dreams you work with the kind of intensities involved, exploring multitudinous significances. These are like charged emotional patterns, formed of your own highly personal emotions and intents.
quotes.translation: 实际上，这三组事件很可能同时发生在三个人身上，如果没有正常的沟通，谁也不会察觉。事件的内在织锦正是处理这种关联的。情感强度与意义构成了事件的本质。在梦中，你处理所涉及的各种强度，探索多重意义。这些就像带电的情感模式，由你自己高度个人化的情感与意图所形成。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Feeling acts in many worlds. It is the connective and it strongly connects the three of us. If I sound ponderous it is only because these necessary explanations cannot be given to you in a playful manner. You would discount them. And my dear Joseph, at times I peek in on you between sessions. The twist is a beautifully innocent and wicked contortion that I would enjoy.
quotes.translation: 感受在许多世界中运作。它是连接物，并强烈地连接着我们三个。如果我听起来很沉重，那只是因为这些必要的解释不能以戏谑的方式给你。你会轻视它们。我亲爱的约瑟夫，有时我会在课间偷看你。那个扭动是一种美丽天真又顽皮的扭曲，我会很享受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In other terms you could also say that an entity visits all planes simultaneously, as it is possible for you to visit one particular state, one particular county, one particular city at one time. Also you might visit the state of sorrow and joy almost simultaneously, and experience both emotions in heightened state because of the almost immediate contrast between them.
quotes.translation: 用另一种说法，你也可以说一个存有同时造访所有层面，就像你有可能同时造访一个州、一个县、一个城市一样。你也可能几乎同时造访悲伤与喜悦的状态，并因两者之间几乎立即的对比，而在强化状态下体验这两种情感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The child took all this as the punishment for violence. The mother now could no longer be violent in act. Not only that, but she was helpless to resist violence. This made the child hold back the most natural of aggressive feelings. In most cases the child can slap the parent. It may be slapped back, but it knows the slap will not really kill the parent. It is pretend.
quotes.translation: 孩子把这一切视为对暴力的惩罚。母亲现在不能再在行动上暴力了。不仅如此，她还无力抵抗暴力。这使孩子压抑了最自然的攻击性感受。在大多数情况下，孩子可以打父母一巴掌。它可能被打回来，但它知道那一巴掌不会真的杀死父母。那是假装的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You form the fabric of your experience through your own beliefs and expectations. These personal ideas about yourself and the nature of reality will affect your thoughts and emotions. You take your beliefs about reality as truth, and often do not question them. They seem self-explanatory. They appear in your mind as statements of fact, far too obvious for examination.
quotes.translation: 你通过自己的信念与期望形成你经验的织锦。这些关于你自己和实相本质的个人想法会影响你的思想与情感。你将自己对实相的信念视为真理，并且常常不去质疑它们。它们似乎不言自明。它们以事实陈述的形式出现在你心中，显而易见到无需检验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It may seem that response to a particular episode is out of all proportion in intensity, but attached to it may be past material which does carry a heavy charge. Now Ruburt can learn to use his subjective feeling also as an aid in this manner. He should not identify with it to begin with. It would help him if he could imagine it as having a shape or form, or a weight.
quotes.translation: 对某个特定事件的反应在强度上似乎完全不成比例，但附着其上的可能是过去带有沉重电荷的材料。现在鲁柏可以学习以这种方式利用他的主观感受作为辅助。他一开始不应与之认同。如果他能够想象它有一个形状或形式，或一个重量，那会对他有帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are being allowed freedom within limits. (Long pause.) The human race is a stage through which various forms of consciousness travel. The ideals keep the race pointed in beneficial directions. Thoughts and emotions form the basis. You learn by seeing these turn into physical reality. You may be killed by what you have created. If so the lesson is doubly learned.
quotes.translation: 你被允许在限制内拥有自由。（长停顿。）人类种族是一个舞台，各种形式的意识在此穿行。理想使种族指向有益的方向。思想和情感构成基础。你通过观察它们转化为物质实相来学习。你可能会被自己所创造的东西杀死。若是如此，教训便加倍深刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now your closest environment, physically speaking, is your body. It is not like some manikin-shape in which you are imprisoned, that exists apart from you like a casing. Your body is not beautiful or ugly, healthy or deformed, swift or slow simply because this is the kind of body that was thrust upon you indiscriminately at birth. Instead your physical form, your corporeal personal environment, is the physical materialization of your own thoughts, emotions, and interpretations.
quotes.translation: 现在，就物质层面而言，你最亲近的环境就是你的身体。它并非某种你被囚禁其中的假人形状，也不是像外壳那样与你分离存在。你的身体并非只因出生时被随意强加而显得美丽或丑陋、健康或畸形、敏捷或迟缓。相反，你的物质形态、你具体的个人环境，正是你自身思想、情感和诠释的物质化显现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Objects and conditions within the habitual environment become changed with various Emotions, to which you can then rather automatically react, without questioning their validity. Free from these charged objects and conditions, the same response you see may suddenly strike you with surprise, and you will question it. This is highly simplified, but very valid indeed.
quotes.translation: 习惯性环境中的物体和状况会因各种情感而改变，你随后可以相当自动地对其做出反应，而不质疑其有效性。脱离这些被赋予能量的物体和状况后，你看到的相同反应可能会突然让你感到惊讶，并引发你的质疑。这虽高度简化，却非常真实有效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Your environment is the physical picture of your thoughts, emotions and beliefs made visible. Since your thoughts, emotions and beliefs move through space and time, you therefore affect physical conditions separate from you.
quotes.translation: 你的环境是你的思想、情感和信念变得可见的物质画面。由于你的思想、情感和信念穿越时空，你因此会影响与你分离的物质状况。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now, I am here in this room. I am also in another place in another time. Your father is in several dimensions at once. All of this is value fulfillment. It is growth. We are doing well with Ruburt. We are coming through so clearly in fact that he is now in the process of learning how to disentangle himself from me. I leave willingly, but my energy is so strong that he does not know how to let me go. He is fully relaxed. He is not used to feeling my presence however so strongly
quotes.translation: 现在，我在此房间中。我也在另一时间另一地点。你们的父亲同时存在于多个维度。这一切都是价值完成。这是成长。我们与鲁柏合作良好。事实上，我们传达得如此清晰，以至于他正在学习如何与我分离。我乐意离开，但我的能量如此强大，以至于他不知道如何放手。他完全放松了。然而，他并不习惯如此强烈地感受到我的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Physically speaking now, there are mechanisms that interpret physical events. The scientist's field of inquiry involves these. The methods by which emotions, concepts, and energy are projected out from the individual to form the physical environment and events, mainly occur in nonphysical terms, but there are nervous system connections that aid in this projection.
quotes.translation: 就物质层面而言，存在解读物质事件的机制。科学家的研究领域涉及这些机制。情感、概念和能量从个体投射出去以形成物质环境与事件的方法，主要发生在非物质层面，但神经系统连接有助于这种投射。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is a term used occasionally to the effect that an emotional block is like a wall. The analogy is an excellent one. I have told you earlier that there are other kinds of structures beside physical structures. Emotions and thoughts have their own structures, that may be manipulated in the same manner that physical objects are manipulated, generally speaking.
quotes.translation: 偶尔会用到这样一个术语，大意是说情绪障碍就像一堵墙。这个比喻非常贴切。我先前告诉过你，除了物质结构之外，还有其它种类的结构。情绪和思想拥有它们自己的结构，一般来说，这些结构可以像操纵物质对象一样被操纵。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The ego maintains much of its stability by looking backwards, so to speak, into its experience of its past, and finding something of itself there. Now the past may be an illusion, but it is not illusion to the ego. The portions of the self that deal in probabilities do not have such an experience with a past, to give them their feeling of identity or continuity.
quotes.translation: 自我在很大程度上是通过回顾——可以说是回望它过去的经验，并在其中找到自己的某些部分——来维持其稳定性的。现在，过去可能是一种幻相，但对自我而言它并非幻相。处理可能性的那部分自己并没有这样的过去经验，来给予它们身份或连续性的感觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Vitamins, better food, medical attention, may temporarily rejuvenate the body, but unless you change your beliefs it will quickly become swamped again by your feelings of depression. In such a case you must realize that you make your own loneliness, and resolve to change through both thought and action. Action is thought in physical motion, outwardly perceived.
quotes.translation: 维生素、更好的食物、医疗护理，可能会暂时使身体恢复活力，但除非你改变你的信念，否则它很快就会再次被你沮丧的感觉所淹没。在这种情况下，你必须认识到是你自己制造了你的孤独，并决心通过思想和行动来改变。行动是思想在物质运动中的外在表现。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: These psychological structures exist as prerequisites for the material structure of your universe. The inner senses represent such psychological structures. They become physically apparent to some degree in the emotions, which do have definite form, certain mass, depth, and solidity in the realm of psychological perspective which you do not physically perceive.
quotes.translation: 这些心理结构作为你宇宙物质结构的前提条件而存在。内在感官就代表了这样的心理结构。它们在情绪中会变得在一定程度上物理可见，在你们并未物理感知到的心理实相领域中，情绪确实具有明确的形态、一定的质量、深度和坚固性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is not the adventurous spirit they told you of, and you heard every word. On the other hand you do have a rather deeply felt feeling for mechanical objects. This has some connection with your position in the service. But the conscious reasons that you have for being annoyed with your automobile, these reasons are rationalizations to hide the deeper causes.
quotes.translation: 这不是他们告诉你的那种冒险精神，你每个字都听到了。另一方面，你对机械物体确实有一种相当深切的感觉。这与你服役时的职位有些关联。但你对自己汽车感到恼火的有意识理由，这些理由都是合理化解释，用以隐藏更深层的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The twenty minutes of psycho cybernetics should be particularly maintained when he is not feeling well, for in themselves they help him change his mood and give a breathing spell. Often on the days when he needs this exercise most he dispenses with it. As a part of his routine it is an excellent automatic way of mental reconditioning. Now do you have questions?
quotes.translation: 当他感觉不适时，尤其应该坚持那二十分钟的心理控制术练习，因为这本身就能帮助他改变情绪，并提供一个喘息的机会。往往在他最需要这项练习的日子里，他却放弃了它。作为他日常程序的一部分，这是一种极好的自动心理调节方式。现在你们有问题吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You do not need to justify your existence by painting. It is impossible to do so. (Pause.) There are two approaches, either of which would be highly beneficial. The first is to paint a portrait of a person whom you know, trying to portray the essence of that person, their deepest agonies and highest joys, their highest capabilities and fears of failure. (Pause.) This would induce on your part an honest effort to face the raw emotion of another personality, and portray it.
quotes.translation: 你不需要通过绘画来证明自己的存在。这是不可能的。（停顿。）有两种方法，任何一种都极为有益。第一种是为你认识的某个人画一幅肖像，试图描绘那个人的本质——他们最深沉的痛苦与最崇高的喜悦，他们最高的能力与对失败的恐惧。（停顿。）这会促使你诚实地面对另一个人的原始情感，并将其描绘出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is what amounts at times to a wall that separates us, as far as emotion is concerned, and this is our Ruburt's doing, though of course he does not do it deliberately. Again, the strength and indeed the stubbornness of his ego, made the sessions possible, for without it in the beginning there would have been difficulty in maintaining necessary stability.
quotes.translation: 在情感方面，有时存在一堵将我们隔开的墙，这是我们的鲁柏造成的，尽管他当然不是故意的。他的自我的力量，甚至固执，使得这些课成为可能，因为如果没有它，一开始就很难维持必要的稳定性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ruburt correctly interpreted the evening symptoms that sometimes occur. There is some identification with the mother here, based on highly falsified data; if he becomes the mother, then the mother cannot hurt him. And in all such identifications, there is the feeling that by becoming that which one fears there is safety. This is obviously wrong and dangerous.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏正确解读了晚间有时出现的症状。这里存在一些基于高度错误数据与母亲的认同；如果他变成母亲，那么母亲就无法伤害他。而在所有这类认同中，都有一种感觉：通过变成自己所恐惧的事物，就能获得安全。这显然是错误且危险的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: On the other hand your relationship teaches Ruburt to direct and mold his strong Emotional feelings into meaningful, productive work. The creative strain therefore benefits you both. You should be alert however to the fact that Emotional actualization in daily life is necessary, even though at times it will be much stronger than others, for the reasons given.
quotes.translation: 另一方面，你们的关系教会鲁柏将他强烈的情感导向并塑造成有意义、有成效的工作。因此，创造的张力使你们双方都受益。然而，你应该警惕这样一个事实：在日常生活中实现情感是必要的，即使有时它会比平时强烈得多，原因如上所述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Such people realize their deficiency, yet conversely because they do have a distorted but seemingly dominant "I" they are only all the more furious and confused. There is no basic unifying factor to give them consistency, and no unifying subconscious memories to give them true inner identity. This is one of the main reasons why they strike out at strongly integrated personalities, and why it is so easy for them to be catapulted by raw emotion into tragedies of this sort.
quotes.translation: 这样的人意识到自己的缺陷，然而反过来，因为他们确实有一个扭曲但看似主导的“我”，他们只会更加愤怒和困惑。没有一个基本的统一因素赋予他们一致性，也没有统一的潜意识记忆赋予他们真正的内在身份。这就是为什么他们主要攻击那些高度整合的人格，以及为什么他们如此容易被原始情感弹射到这类悲剧中的主要原因之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You are closed to the intricate, voluptuous, sensuous, social experience of the animals, or even of the plants -- not being able to perceive that different kind of biological emotion and belonging, that rich, sensual identification with earth, and cut off from a biologically oriented culture that is everywhere part and parcel of both plant and animal life.
quotes.translation: 你对动物甚至植物那复杂、丰饶、感官、社交的体验是封闭的——无法感知那种不同的生物性情感与归属感，那种与大地丰饶的感官认同，并且与一种以生物为导向的文化隔绝，而这种文化处处都是动植物生命不可或缺的一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The same applies to seeing, and obviously to feeling or touching. It goes without saying that this potentiality is very seldom realized, but it is part of the human heritage. It is the learning process that conditions you to translate a given stimuli into data that will be picked up by a given physical sense; that is, translations always occur in any case.
quotes.translation: 这同样适用于视觉，显然也适用于感觉或触觉。不用说，这种潜能极少被实现，但它属于人类与生俱来的禀赋。正是学习过程使你习惯于将特定刺激转化为能被特定肉体感官接收的数据——换言之，转化在任何情况下都会发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Let me try to throw some light upon what I am trying to tell you. First of all, love always involves freedom. If a man says he loves you and yet denies you your freedom, then you often hate him. Yet because of his words you do not feel justified in the emotion. This sort of emotional tangle itself can lead to continued entanglements through various lives.
quotes.translation: 让我试着阐明我想告诉你的内容。首先，爱始终包含自由。若有人声称爱你却剥夺你的自由，你往往会憎恨他。然而因着他的言语，你又会觉得这种情绪缺乏正当性。这种情感纠葛本身可能通过多世人生导致持续的纠缠。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are also passing relationships, contacts made and then dropped. A mate from any given life, for example, may or may not represent someone with whom you have a deep abiding tie, and again you may marry someone because of highly ambiguous feelings from a past life, and choose a married relationship that is not based upon love, though love may emerge.
quotes.translation: 还有那些短暂的关系——建立后又中断的接触。例如，某一世的人生伴侣可能代表也可能不代表与你有着深刻持久羁绊的人；同样，你可能因前世高度模糊的情感而结婚，选择一段并非基于爱（尽管爱可能后来产生）的婚姻关系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: No physical matter is without this electromagnetic reality, and no thought exists which does not exist within this reality. Again, I am not speaking symbolically, but quite practically. Emotions, having their own reality within this system, do not affect physical matter indirectly, but cause specific electromagnetic changes within the physical organism.
quotes.translation: 没有任何物质实体不具备这种电磁实相，也没有任何思想能脱离此实相而存在。再次强调，我并非在象征性地说，而是非常实际地陈述。情感在此系统内拥有自身实相，它们并非间接影响物质实体，而是在肉体组织内引发特定的电磁变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner senses to some extent will allow you to perceive the reality of inner existence, and Ruburt incidentally in this new development is involved with the use of these inner senses in a more effective manner than before. There are some changes in the way connections are made. This gives Ruburt a feeling of strangeness as he makes inner adjustments.
quotes.translation: 内在感官在某种程度上将允许你感知内在存在的实相，而鲁柏在这次新发展中，正以比以往更有效的方式运用这些内在感官。连接方式发生了一些变化，这使鲁柏在进行内在调整时感到陌生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: If you examine your thoughts for five minutes at various times during the day for several times a month, you will indeed receive a correct impression of the kind of life you have so far arranged for yourself in the next existence. If you are not pleased with what you discover, then you had better begin changing the nature of your thoughts and feelings.
quotes.translation: 若你每月数次在一天中不同时段花五分钟检视自己的思想，你确实会正确感知到自己为下一世所安排的生活形态。若对发现的结果不满意，你最好立即开始改变思想与感受的本质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The subconscious, as you call it, represents a tremendous raw power that triggers forth into construction according to the expectations which you form from the emotions. The intellect should help you understand this power plant, so that you can switch your power where it is needed. The intellect should operate like an x-ray, enabling you to see inward.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的潜意识代表着一股巨大的原始力量，它会根据你们从情绪中形成的期待而触发建构。理智应帮助你们理解这座能量工厂，以便你们能将力量导向需要之处。理智应像X光般运作，使你们能向内透视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The feeling of something hanging over, threatening or overhanging, on the upper half of the object, and dark. Something small and bright also, beneath this overhanging or threatening portion. 1966, also looking forward to 1967. Connection with a photograph I believe, or other object with triangular corners that photographs usually fit into in an album.
quotes.translation: 物体上半部分笼罩着某种悬垂、威胁或压迫感，且呈暗色。在这悬垂或压迫部分之下，还有某种小而明亮的东西。1966年，也展望1967年。我相信这与一张照片有关，或是其他带有三角角的物品——那种通常被放入相册的相片所特有的三角角。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: If indeed it is understood that this personality, as with many personalities, has been materialized in feminine form, then these perfectly natural dependent feelings are found to be merely residues from previous personality patterns. And a word here should be said, indeed, concerning the distortive ideas that arise concerning dependency and passivity.
quotes.translation: 若真能理解这个人格——如同许多人格一样——是以女性形态显化，那么这些完全自然的依赖感，便只是过往人格模式的残余。在此必须说明，关于依赖与被动所产生的扭曲观念，确实值得探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Because you do not understand that your thoughts create illness you will continue to undergo it, however, and new symptoms will appear. You will again return to the doctor. When you are in the process of changing beliefs -- when you are beginning to realize that your thoughts and feelings cause illness -- then for a while you may not know what to do.
quotes.translation: 然而，因为你们不了解思想会创造疾病，你们将继续承受病痛，新的症状也会出现。你们会再次求医。当你们处于改变信念的过程中——当你们开始意识到思想和感受会引发疾病时——你们可能会暂时不知所措。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Ruburt's almost instant reaction following the G.I. notice was, here, excellent. The aggressive feeling, unharnessed, would have caused difficulties at the gallery, and even in your personal relationship. His seeking out of his friend, your landlady, was beneficial, since in harmless talk and chatter much aggressive energy was harmlessly constructed.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在收到征兵通知后几乎即刻的反应，在此处堪称绝佳。未被驾驭的攻击性感受，本会在画廊甚至你们的私人关系中造成困扰。他主动找朋友——你们的房东太太——倾诉是有益的，因为无害的闲谈与絮语中，大量攻击性能量得到了无害的转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Used, they can help you fulfill yourself to the utmost. There is no coincidence that it is the left ear involved. You have used the symbolism of right and wrong. The right ear, the wrong ear, bothers you for you do not want to hear what you consider the bad sounds. The left ear and the left portion of the body generally also are connected with the unconscious. And the sounds are somewhat connected with your feeling toward oil paints. Do you see the connection?
quotes.translation: 善加运用，它们能助你最大程度地实现自我。涉及左耳绝非巧合。你一直运用着对与错的象征体系。右耳、错误的耳朵困扰着你，因为你不愿听到你认为不好的声音。左耳及身体左侧通常也与潜意识相连。而这些声音与你对油画颜料的感受有些关联。你看出其中的联系了吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are in your terms, then, unlimited probable future events for which you are now setting groundworks. The nature of the thoughts and feelings you originate and those that you habitually or characteristically receive set a pattern, so you will choose from those probable futures those events that will physically become your experience. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，你们正在为无数可能的未来事件奠定基础，而这些事件目前尚未发生。你们所发起的想法和感受的性质，以及你们习惯性或特征性地接收的那些，会形成一个模式，因此你们将从那些可能的未来中选择那些将实际成为你们经历的事件。（停顿）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your beliefs have generated feelings of unworth. Having artificially separated yourselves from nature, you do not trust it, but often experience it as an adversary. Your religions granted man a soul, while denying any to other species. Your bodies then were relegated to nature and your souls to God, who stood immaculately apart from His creations.
quotes.translation: 你们的信念产生了无价值感。由于人为地将自己与自然分离，你们不信任自然，反而常常将其视为对手。你们的宗教赋予人类灵魂，却否认其他物种拥有灵魂。于是你们的身体被归为自然，而灵魂则归于上帝，上帝则与他的创造物完美地分离。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 805, MAY 16, 1977
9:28 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: I will never on the other hand insist upon a groveling humility, a feeling of uselessness, for upon such a false and inadequate conception of self is based the most unfortunate sort of exterior posturing. I insist upon an honest, humble and proud acceptance of your own relationship with the universe, and an acceptance of your responsibility in it.
quotes.translation: 另一方面，我绝不会坚持一种卑躬屈膝的谦卑、一种无用感，因为在这种虚假且不恰当的自我认知之上，建立的是最不幸的外在姿态。我坚持的是诚实、谦逊且自豪地接受你们与宇宙的关系，并接受你们在其中所承担的责任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The energy generated by some such experiences is enough to change a life in a matter of moments, and to affect the understanding and behavior of others. These are intrusions of knowledge from one dimension of activity to another. They are highly charged and volatile. Unknowingly, the individual who receives such information is himself a part of it. The entire feeling-tone of his present personality is changed -- and directly -- by the information he receives.
quotes.translation: 某些此类经历所产生的能量，足以在瞬间改变一个人的生命，并影响他人的理解与行为。这些是从一个活动维度到另一个维度的知识入侵。它们高度浓缩且不稳定。不知不觉中，接收此类信息的个体本身已成为它的一部分。他当前人格的整个感受基调——直接地——被他所接收的信息所改变。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "Four: I will realize that the future is a probability. In terms of ordinary experience, nothing exists there yet. It is virgin territory, planted by my feelings and thoughts in the present. Therefore I will plant accomplishments and successes, and I will do this by remembering that nothing can exist in the future that I do not want to be there."
quotes.translation: "第四：我将认识到未来是一种可能性。就普通经验而言，那里尚不存在任何事物。它是处女地，由我当下的感受和思想所播种。因此，我将播种成就与成功，而我将通过记住这一点来做到：未来不可能存在任何我不希望它存在的事物。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: At the same time all beliefs are communicated to others, not only through quite unconscious bodily mechanisms, but telepathically. You will always try to correlate your ideas with exterior experience. (Pause.) All of the abilities of the inner self will be brought to bear to materialize the image of your beliefs, regardless of what they ought to be. The "proper" emotions will be generated, bringing about those body states that exist in your conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 与此同时，所有信念不仅通过完全无意识的身体机制，还通过心电感应传达给他人。你们总会试图将你们的想法与外在经验相关联。（停顿）内在自我的所有能力都将被调动起来，以物质化你们信念的形象，无论这些信念应该是什么。将会产生"恰当的"情绪，从而带来那些存在于你们意识心中的身体状态。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The psychological feeling of intensity has its own electromagnetic reality. An action is an experienced intensity, and need not involve motion in physical terms. As I have said, every action is a part of every other action, and affects every other action, and is also so affected itself. This is not however your cause and effect theory at all.
quotes.translation: 心理上的强烈感受有其自身的电磁实相。行动是一种被体验的强度，无需涉及物理层面的运动。如我所说，每个行动都是其他所有行动的一部分，影响其他所有行动，同时也被其影响。但这完全不是你们所谓的因果理论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: To understand yourself and what you are, you can learn to experience yourself directly apart from your beliefs about yourself. What I would like each reader to do is to sit quietly. Close your eyes. Try to sense within yourself the deep feeling-tones that I mentioned earlier (in the 613th session in Chapter One). This is not difficult to do.
quotes.translation: 要了解你自己以及你的本质，你可以学会直接体验自己，抛开你对自己的信念。我希望每位读者做的是：安静地坐下，闭上眼睛，试着在内心感受我之前提到过的深层感受基调（见第一章第613节）。这并不难做到。

quotes.text: He has been afraid of directing either outward for fear of hurting others. (Long pause.) He must learn to handle normal aggressions, and yet when he is operating spontaneously his natural exuberance is a mechanism for such release. (Long pause.) He was aware of your feelings. He felt that any success of his was a threat to you. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 他一直害怕将攻击性向外释放，唯恐伤害他人。（长停顿。）他必须学会处理正常的攻击性，而当他自发运作时，他天生的活力正是释放这种攻击性的机制。（长停顿。）他察觉到了你的感受。他觉得自己的任何成功对你都是一种威胁。（长停顿。）

quotes.translation: 如果这让你觉得过于理智，那么你也可以从你的情绪反向推导到你的信念。无论如何，无论你选择哪种方法，一种方法都会引导你走向另一种。两种方法都需要你对自己诚实，并坚定地面对你当前实相的心智、心灵和情感层面。

quotes.text: You must study the quality of life, dare to follow the patterns of your own thoughts and emotions, and to ride that mobility, for in that mobility there are hints of the origin of the universe and of the psyche. quotes.translation: 你必须研究生命的品质，敢于追随自己思想和情绪的模式，并驾驭那种流动性，因为在那流动性中，蕴含着宇宙和心灵的起源线索。因此，诗人对宇宙和自然的看法比科学家更科学，因为自然被理解得更多。

quotes.text: Because of the physical structure, experiences within your system have a slow-motion distortion which creates the appearance of time. quotes.text: It is easy for you to see that seeds bring forth the fruit of the earth, each [of] their own kind. No seed is identical to any other, yet generally speaking there are species that serve to unite them. You do not mistake an orange for a grape. In the same way ideas or thoughts form general patterns, bringing forth in your world certain kinds of events. In this respect your thoughts and feelings "seed" physical reality, bringing forth materializations.
quotes.translation: 你很容易看到种子结出地上的果实，各从其类。没有两颗种子是完全相同的，但一般来说，有物种将它们统一起来。你不会把橙子误认为葡萄。同样地，想法或思想形成一般模式，在你们的世界中带来特定种类的事件。在这方面，你的思想和情感“播种”了物质实相，带来了具体化。
