source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You set upon this adventure, the two of you. It is meaningless to say that the books are Ruburt's. Your ideas of "perfection" and love of detail, or if you prefer, your feeling for the significance of detail that appears exteriorized in your notes, is as present in the inner consistency of the material itself as given by me.
quotes.translation: 你们两人共同踏上了这场冒险。说这些书是鲁柏的毫无意义。你对"完美"的执着与对细节的热爱，或者如果你愿意这么说，你对笔记中外显细节之重要性的感受，与我传递的资料本身内在的一致性同样存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Now I'll refer the reader to Note 6 for Session 711, which is the session for which I'm assembling this chronology to begin with. In that note I presented some material on ancient connections with the name, Seth, then quoted Seth on the subject of names from the ESP class session for April 17, 1973. For instance:)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: We will end the session. I wanted to make clear the fact that illness can be a method of learning (Long pause), and to tell you that Ruburt's subjective feelings this evening were legitimate. New freedoms will follow. Intuitively you also provided clues that he needed this evening, but he was also ready to put them together.
quotes.translation: 我们将结束此节。我想阐明疾病可以是一种学习方式（长停顿），并告诉你们鲁柏今晚的主观感受是合理的。新的自由即将到来。你直觉上也提供了他今晚需要的线索，但他也已准备好将这些线索串联起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These units are natural emanations from all kinds of consciousness. They are the invisible formations resulting from reaction to any kind of stimuli. They very seldom exist in isolation, but unite under certain laws. They change both their form and their pulsation. Their relative "duration" depends upon the original intensity behind them -- that is, behind the original thought, emotion, stimuli, or reaction that brought them into being.
quotes.translation: 这些单元是所有意识自然散发之物。它们是对任何刺激产生反应后形成的无形构造。它们极少单独存在，而是在特定法则下结合。它们既改变形态也改变脉动。其相对"存续时间"取决于背后的原始强度——即产生它们的最初思想、情绪、刺激或反应背后的强度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The intellect is highly important. It has little to do however with the framework within which our tests take place. The idea of a game will indeed work more to our advantage, for this is not an intellectual exercise. The intellect can be used most handily in tabulating our results, but it will not help us to get our results, unless it is utilized as a means toward discovering how best to harness the emotions for communication purposes.
quotes.translation: 智力极为重要。但它与我们测试发生的架构几乎无关。游戏的概念反而更有利于我们，因为这不是智力练习。智力最便于用来整理我们的结果，但除非将其作为发现如何最佳驾驭情绪以达成沟通目的的手段，否则它无助于我们获得结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: John remembers subconsciously the old situation. This is partially the cause of some of the negative feelings, but there is no guilt in any (underlined) of this. No one save the individual entity knows in what directions weaknesses lie that need correction, and it sets about forming life dramas in which these can be faced.
quotes.translation: 约翰潜意识里记得旧有的情境。这是部分负面感受的成因，但其中绝无任何罪咎。除了个体自身，无人知晓哪些方向的弱点需要修正，于是它开始构建能够面对这些弱点的生命戏剧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Quite literally, the "inner self" forms the body by magically transforming thoughts and emotions into physical counterparts. You grow the body. Its condition perfectly mirrors your subjective state at any given time. Using atoms and molecules, you build your body, forming basic elements into a form that you call your own.
quotes.translation: 毫不夸张地说，“内在自我”通过将思想和情感神奇地转化为物质对应物来形成身体。你生长着身体。它的状况完美地反映了你任何特定时刻的主观状态。利用原子和分子，你构建自己的身体，将基本元素塑造成你称之为自己的形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: An action has reality, as you know, within every possible field of activity. An emotion has an electrical and chemical structure. This is extremely important. It is not a structure that takes up space as you know it, obviously, but it is a structure nevertheless, and could be compared to the appearance of dream locations.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，一个行动在每一个可能的活动领域中都拥有实相。一种情感具有电性和化学结构。这一点极为重要。显然，它并非如你所知的那种占据空间的结构，但它确实是一种结构，可以比作梦境地点的显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In a strange manner she holds the family together, simply because they unite so strongly against her. Without this they would be less united. A rather delicate psychological gestalt operates with the family as a whole. The father actually is not the uniting principle here, but the feeling against the mother, at this time.
quotes.translation: 以一种奇特的方式，她维系着这个家庭，仅仅是因为他们如此强烈地联合起来反对她。没有她，他们就不会如此团结。一个相当微妙的心理完形以家庭整体运作着。父亲实际上并非这里的联合原则，而是此时对母亲的感受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: （2nd Question: "Can you elaborate upon the closet data?" "Ruburt thinks of your mother's sewing room. To me a reference to some shape, dark and narrow with the feeling of motion involved, as a falling through or a falling out. Downward motion, with some speed." The sewing room of my mother is a legitimate connection.
quotes.translation: （第二个问题：“你能详细说明壁橱的资料吗？”“鲁柏想起你母亲的缝纫室。对我来说，这指向某种形状，黑暗而狭窄，带有运动的感受，如同坠落或跌出。向下运动，带着某种速度。”）我母亲的缝纫室是一个合理的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This is done by combining belief, emotion and imagination, and forming them into a mental picture of the desired physical result. Of course, the wanted result is not yet physical or you would not need to create it, so it does no good to say that your physical experience seems to contradict what you are trying to do.
quotes.translation: 这是通过结合信念、情感和想象，并将它们塑造成所期望物质结果的心像来完成的。当然，想要的结果尚未物质化，否则你就不需要创造它了，所以认为你的物质经验似乎与你试图做的事情相矛盾是毫无益处的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your emotional feelings are, as you know, the inner senses as they appear close to the physical plane. These are the directives. You form in your own personal perspective the data that exists within the inner self, but you do this on an individual basis in line with your own expectations, suggestions and attitudes.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，你的情感感受是内在感官在接近物质层面时的显现。这些是指令。你在自己的个人视角中形成内在自我内存在的资料，但你是根据自身的期望、暗示和态度，在个人基础上这样做的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （This "hanging before" appearance, it will be remembered, is remarkably similar to the effect I observed when the same three of us experimented with our first and only seance. See the 11th session, page 56. In this one, as Bill, Jane and I stared into a mirror, the reflection of Jane's head changed in size and shape, and finally appeared to hang in space just forward of the rest of her reflection. That appearance had taken place in much poorer light than tonight's event, however. This time I could see in detail the changes taking place, and their end. [Session 11 is in Vol. 1.]

quotes.text: It is strongly aware of your feelings toward it. At times the personality traits that it had earlier color this perception. It pushes these aside impatiently. It has mental images of its own probable future, and parts of it do become frightened at times, to relinquish old adult powers for an infant's helplessness.
quotes.translation: 它强烈感知到你对它的感受。有时它早期的人格特质会为这种感知染上色彩。它不耐烦地推开这些特质。它拥有关于自身可能未来的心灵图像，某些部分有时会因要放弃成人的力量换取婴儿的无助而感到恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, it can be said that you have reincarnational civilizations as well as reincarnating individuals. Each entity who is born in flesh works toward the development of those abilities that can be best nurtured and fulfilled within the physical environment. He has a responsibility to and for the civilization in which he has each existence, for he helps form it through his own thoughts, emotions, and actions.
quotes.translation: 可以说，从某种角度来看，你们既有转世的文明，也有转世的个体。每个生于肉身的存有都致力于发展那些能在物质环境中得到最佳培育和实现的能力。他对所存在的每个文明都负有责任，因为他通过自己的思想、情感和行动塑造了它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: For one thing, individuals who finally visit such offices are oftentimes already emotionally upset. Oftentimes also those in attendance, the doctors or other healers are themselves tired, prone to the patient's emotional fears, and automatically in self-defense respond by giving voice to the patient's subconscious dread, picking it up telepathically but feeling it is directed at themselves, on a subconscious level of course.
quotes.translation: 首先，最终造访这类诊所的个体往往已经情绪不安。同样，在场的医生或其他疗愈者自己也常感疲惫，容易受到患者情绪恐惧的影响，于是自动出于自我防卫，将患者潜意识的恐惧说出口——他们通过心电感应接收到这种恐惧，却在潜意识层面觉得这是针对自己的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I think that you will find this particular session most beneficial. The desire to set yourself apart from emotion, and coolly appraise it, is merely an indication of the ego's characteristic nature. It tries to separate itself from action, to view it objectively, and to see itself as something apart from action.
quotes.translation: 我认为你会发现这场课特别有益。想要将自己与情感分离并冷静评估它的欲望，不过是自我本质特性的表现。它试图将自己与行动分开，客观地审视行动，并视自己为与行动分离的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Ruburt spoke before the session of handling aggression. Consciously you have the Emotions of one personality to contend with and to direct constructively. One set of responsibilities and potentials. At other levels you have the problems, potentials and responsibilities of many to contend with in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在课前谈到了处理攻击性。在意识层面，你必须应对一个人格的情感，并建设性地引导它们。这是一套责任与潜能。在其他层面上，你同样需要以相同方式应对许多人的问题、潜能与责任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The outer ego is not continuously, in your terms, aware of anything. It frequently forgets itself. When it becomes swept up in a strong emotion it seems to lose itself. There is unity then but no sense of apartness. When it most vigorously maintains its sense of individuality it is no longer aware of unity-with.
quotes.translation: 外在自我并非持续觉知一切——用你们的话说。它经常忘记自己。当它被强烈情感席卷时，似乎会迷失自我。那时存在统一性，却无分离感。当它最竭力维持个体感时，便不再觉知与万物的合一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Children of either sex identify quite naturally with both parents, and any enforced method of exclusively directing the child to such a single identification is limiting. Under such conditions, feelings of guilt immediately begin to arise whenever such a child feels natural affiliations toward the other parent.
quotes.translation: 不论性别，孩子都会很自然地认同双亲，任何强制孩子只认同单亲的方法都是限制性的。在这种情况下，每当孩子对另一位父母产生自然的亲近感时，内疚感就会立即开始涌现。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When the offending emotion is recognized as a part of the self it can then be rather harmlessly dispensed with. It takes its place along with other personality traits. It gains its power and strength only when it is forcibly isolated, for it then cannot merge with the normal ebb and flow of subjective activity.
quotes.translation: 当冒犯性的情绪被认可为自我的一部分时，它就可以相当无害地被处理掉。它与其他性格特质一起各安其位。只有当它被强行孤立时，它才会获得力量和强度，因为那时它无法融入主观活动的正常起伏。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If you understood the nature of love you would be able to accept feelings of hatred. Affirmation can include the expression of such strong emotions. Give us a moment ...
quotes.translation: 如果你理解爱的本质，你就能够接纳恨的感受。肯定可以包含这种强烈情绪的表达。请稍等片刻……
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This person will move quickly upward however, taking Philips ideas along. Philip has either been offered another job in the immediate past or will be in the very immediate future. The initial M--I am uncertain here. The name Midol (my phonetic interpretation) and a connection with an unscrupulous kind of lawyer or associate. In any case definitely the feeling of a treachery involved, not on Philip's part but using Philip.
quotes.translation: 不过此人会迅速上升，带着菲利普的想法一起。菲利普在最近要么已经被提供了另一份工作，要么在非常近的未来会得到。首字母M——我这里不确定。名字Midol（我的音译）与一个无良律师或合伙人有联系。无论如何，肯定涉及一种背叛感，不是菲利普造成的，而是利用菲利普。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is a last-ditch escape so to speak, but dangerous because its signs are not obvious. "Well, all right, I will close you out then." This is the Emotional feeling behind it. Such a recourse, again, is only a desperate final one, but with his stubbornness it would be very final, and a means of self defense.
quotes.translation: 这可以说是最后的逃路，但很危险，因为其迹象不明显。"好吧，那我就把你排除在外。"这是背后的情绪感受。再次强调，这种手段只是绝望的最后选择，但以他的固执，这将是最终的手段，也是一种自卫方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: And that self can see through physical reality. And to that self, physical reality is like a breath of smoke in air... and that self does not need the characteristics that you know and find so endearing. And yet it is not an unemotional self; it is a self that has condensed emotions; and, it is not distant.
quotes.translation: 那个自我能看穿物质实相。对那个自我而言，物质实相就像空气中的一缕烟……那个自我不需要你所知并觉得如此可爱的那些特质。然而它并非一个无情的自我；它是一个浓缩了情感的自我；而且，它并不疏远。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These points are like invisible power plants, in other words, activated when any emotional feeling or thought of sufficient intensity comes into contact. The points themselves intensify whatever activates them in a quite neutral manner.
quotes.translation: 这些点如同无形的能量站，换言之，当任何具有足够强度的情绪感受或思想与之接触时，它们就会被激活。这些点本身会以完全中立的方式强化任何激活它们的事物。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We go back to our fundamentals: You create reality through your feelings, thoughts, and mental actions. Some of these are physically materialized, others are actualized in probable systems. You are presented with an endless series of choices, it seems, at any point, some more or less favorable than others.
quotes.translation: 我们回归基本原理：你通过感受、思想和心智行动创造实相。其中一些会物质化显现，另一些则在可能系统中实现。在任一时刻，你似乎都面临无尽的选择序列，有些选择比其他选择更有利或更不利。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: As stated, thoughts are as natural as any portion of the body. They are as much a part of nature as feelings are, but if you set up an arbitrary division -- considering thoughts mental as distinguished from the physical -- then your body may give a truer reflection of your being than your thoughts do.
quotes.translation: 现在：如前所述，思想与身体的任何部分一样自然。它们与感受一样是自然的一部分，但若你设立人为的分界——将思想视为与身体相区别的心智产物——那么你的身体可能比思想更真实地反映你的存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: He has wondered about this. There seems to be some connection with the initials A's for him I believe. This may be in terms of business or a business venture. In any case there seems to be a feeling of permanency with this--something that once undertaken will continue. This could be a partnership of sorts.
quotes.translation: 他曾对此感到困惑。我相信这似乎与他姓名首字母A存在某种关联。这可能涉及商业或商业冒险。无论如何，这似乎带有某种持久性的感受——一旦着手便会持续发展。这可能是某种合伙关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Within your system however, color, to man, is more important than shape, though this is not true with all species in your system. Color is closer to Emotional experience than shape. It is also, believe it or not, closer to sound. The connections between color and Emotion are too obvious to discuss here.
quotes.translation: 然而在你们的系统中，色彩对人类而言比形状更重要，尽管这对你们系统中的所有物种并非如此。色彩比形状更接近情绪体验。信不信由你，它也远比形状更接近声音。色彩与情绪之间的关联显而易见，此处无需赘述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: But in its overzealous behavior we find that it is instead threatening the self. Secondary personalities are caused by repressed emotions on a psychological basis that attempts to maintain an ascendancy. Your ulcer is indeed the same sort of growth, but on a physical and not on a psychological level.
quotes.translation: 但在其过度热切的行为中，我们发现它反而威胁到自体。次人格是由被压抑的情绪在试图维持优势的心理基础上造成的。你的溃疡确实是同类型的增生，只不过发生在生理层面而非心理层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （[Peggy:] "This is a good description of the guest house where we stayed on St. Thomas on Friday and Saturday, October 22. 23. The guest house was two story, and built on the side of a steep hill; it had the feeling of being raised up because of this. It had a long porch with a railing and benches."）
quotes.translation: （佩姬：“这是对我们10月22日、23日（周五、周六）在圣托马斯岛所住旅馆的生动描述。那家旅馆是两层小楼，建在陡峭的山坡上，因此有种凌空高悬的感觉。它有一条带栏杆和长椅的长廊。”）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Art is as much a science, in the truest sense of the word, as biology is. Science as you think of it separates itself from the subject at hand. Art identifies with the subject. In your terms, then, other civilizations considered art as a fine science, and used it in such a way that it painted a very clear-cut picture of the nature of reality -- a picture in which human emotion and motivation played a grand role.
quotes.translation: 艺术在最真实的意义上同样是一门科学，正如生物学一样。你们所认为的科学与研究对象保持距离，而艺术则与研究对象融为一体。因此，按你们的说法，其他文明将艺术视为一门精妙的科学，并以此描绘出一幅关于现实本质的清晰图景——在这幅图景中，人类情感与动机扮演着重要角色。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

quotes.text: The imaginative events generate appropriate emotions, which automatically bring about hormonal* changes in your body or affect your behavior with others, or cause you to interpret events always in the light of your beliefs. And so daily experience will seem to justify what you believe more and more.
quotes.translation: 想象性事件会引发相应的情绪，这些情绪会自动导致你体内的荷尔蒙变化，或影响你与他人的互动，或使你始终根据自身信念来解读事件。于是日常经验会越来越显得印证你的信念。

quotes.text: The only way out of it is to become aware of your beliefs, aware of your own conscious thought, and to change your beliefs so that you bring them more in line with the kind of reality you want to experience. Imagination and emotion will then automatically come into play to reinforce the new beliefs.
quotes.translation: 唯一的出路是觉察你的信念，觉察你有意识的思维，并改变你的信念，使其更符合你想要体验的现实。届时想象力与情绪会自动发挥作用，强化这些新信念。

quotes.text: （May 5: Feeling of great enlargement in both hands as I lay on bed. This is not the now familiar sensation of swelling in the fingers and the palm, but rather one of actual physical increase in size. Both my hands felt at least double in area; as though they had grown, or I was wearing giant gloves.
quotes.translation: （5月5日：躺在床上时双手感到明显膨胀。这不是以往熟悉的手指与手掌肿胀感，而是实实在在的物理尺寸增大。我的双手感觉面积至少扩大了一倍，仿佛它们真的变大了，或是我戴上了巨大的手套。）

quotes.text: Now you can reverse this process. Negative habits of thought, and withheld feelings and emotions got you into this, and the same, backwards, can get you out.

quotes.text: You are used to a particular kind of orientation, accustomed to using your consciousness in one particular manner. In order to study the "unknown" reality, however, you must try to see what else your consciousness can do. This really means that you must learn to regain the true feeling of yourself.
quotes.translation: 你已习惯于某种特定的导向，习惯于以某种特定方式运用意识。然而，为了研究"未知"的现实，你必须试着看看你的意识还能做些什么。这实际上意味着你必须学会重新获得对自我的真实感受。

quotes.text: （She reported that at the end of the session she received a strong emotional feeling from Seth. It was directed toward us and was to this effect: "Through action, see how I'm a part of you both now, and how foolish it is of you to worry about identities, when all identities are so bound together."
quotes.translation: （她报告说，在课程结束时，她收到了来自赛斯的一种强烈的情感。这种情感是直接指向我们的，大意是："通过行动，看看我现在如何成为你们两人的一部分，当所有身份都如此紧密相连时，你们担心身份问题显得多么愚蠢。"）

quotes.text: This is difficult to put into words. Feel toward us rather than think at us, and let us see how we do. Self-suggestion may be most beneficial when possible, when used to put you in this more intuitive frame of mind. Turn your emotions towards us, and I think we'll be able to pick up your objects.
quotes.translation: 这很难用言语表达。请用情感而非思维来感受我们，让我们看看我们做得如何。在可能的情况下，自我暗示可能最为有益，当它被用来将你置于这种更直觉的心境时。将你们的情感转向我们，我想我们就能接收到你们的物件。

quotes.text: He had always made sounds that communicated emotions, intent, and sheer exuberance. When he became involved with sketched or drawn images, he began to imitate their form with the shape of his lips. The "O" was perfect, and represents one of his initial, deliberate sounds of verbalized language.
quotes.translation: 他一直以来都会发出传达情感、意图和纯粹活力的声音。当他开始参与素描或绘画图像时，他开始用嘴唇的形状模仿它们的形式。"O"形非常完美，代表了他最初有意识发出的语言声音之一。

quotes.text: It is not that I wasn't feeling humorous this evening, merely that I didn't think you could stand the full force of my really astounding sardonic nature. I just say these things to watch your reactions. And as far as assimilating our old friend Frank Watts, don't let me lead you too far astray.
quotes.translation: 并非我今晚缺乏幽默感，只是我认为你们无法承受我那真正令人震惊的讽刺本性的全部力量。我说这些只是为了观察你们的反应。至于吸收我们的老朋友弗兰克·瓦茨，别让我把你们引得太偏。

quotes.text: This is a most enjoyable and beneficial way of psychic relaxation and renewal. Do not be concerned with physical time. Do not overdo. Come home before you are tired. Forget if possible all personal egotistical considerations, feeling only psychic unity. You will be amazed at how this will help.
quotes.translation: 这是一种非常愉快且有益的心灵放松与更新的方式。不要担心物理时间。不要过度。在感到疲倦之前回家。如果可能的话，忘记所有个人的自我中心考量，只感受心灵的统一。你会惊讶于这会有多大的帮助。

quotes.text: An examination of your conscious thoughts will tell you much about the state of your inner mind, your intentions and expectations, and will often lead you to a direct confrontation with challenges and problems. Your thoughts, studied, will let you see where you are going. They point clearly to the nature of physical events. What exists physically exists first in thought and feeling. There is no other rule.
quotes.translation: 检视你有意识的念头，会让你清楚了解内在心灵的状态、你的意图与期待，并常引导你直接面对挑战与问题。研究你的念头，会让你看清自己正走向何方。它们清楚指向物质事件的性质。物质世界存在的一切，必先存在于思想与感受中。没有其他法则。

quotes.text: This sculp represents more, literally, than your past life's feeling, since it is, now, a mobile cross. There will be a change of simple relationships within the structure, and of color and texture, to follow. A less balanced but more maneuverable symbol--still based on this structure however.
quotes.translation: 这个雕塑实际上承载的远不止你过去人生的感受，因为它此刻是一个可动的十字架。结构内部的简单关系、色彩与质感都将随之改变。这是一个较不平衡但更易操控的象征——不过仍以此结构为基础。

quotes.text: I see you both now very clearly and I must say that I approve of what I see. I will try to answer a few questions but let us keep these few moments in a light and pleasant vein. This is something of an experience involving your so- called emotions in these sessions for perhaps the first time.
quotes.translation: 我现在非常清楚地看见你们两位，我必须说我很满意所见到的。我会试着回答几个问题，但让我们以轻松愉快的基调度过这几分钟。这或许是这些课程中首次涉及你们所谓情绪的体验。

However, the thought which is now an approximation of the original thought, and actually an identity of its own--
quotes.translation: 此外，所有个体都熟悉情绪——当它们以电力强度存在时——并习惯于对其做出反应。整个过程是瞬间发生的。然而，那个念头如今已是原始念头的近似物，实际上已具有自身的身份——

quotes.text: The emotions belong to the personality, that is to the present personality, and are strongly connected both to the conscious ego and to the inner self, which is so often ignored. This is the rather difficult part for me to explain, I'm afraid. I'm not sure how to go about making this clear.
quotes.translation: 情绪属于人格，即属于当前的人格，并与常被忽略的内在自体及意识自我紧密相连。恐怕这部分对我而言相当难以解释。我不确定该如何阐明这点。

quotes.translation: 是的。然而最重要的是承认感受的正当性，它自有其存在领域，接纳它作为你的一部分。然后选择如何处理它。你不该让他人承受你的愤怒；愤怒只是一种沟通方式。

quotes.translation: 这个误解看似扭曲，实则并非如此。当一个人持续转世为同一性别时，人格的整体印象往往呈现相反性别的特质。鲁柏在此处强烈捕捉到了女性特质。

quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻，我们要进行内在资料传输。与死亡有关联。不知这是近期事件，还是他在思念某位逝去的友人。这个死亡涉及窒息感——并非有人被勒死，而是窒息般的感受。

quotes.translation: 这再次涉及行动的本质，下节课我将开始讨论情感与行动的关系及情感作为行动的一部分。今晚鲁柏短暂的疲惫，正是情感行动与反作用力相互冲撞的自然结果。

quotes.translation: 十月的关联与已购画作有关。我认为音乐指的是鲁柏对某幅画作的主观感受（我们解读资料时曾犹豫是否采信这点），同时也涉及牙医或其家人的某些音乐倾向。

quotes.text: Your feelings here largely result from a lack of understanding as to the nature of the subconscious. As I have told Ruburt often you cannot be a pure channel, through which information miraculously flows. You are a personality, and you must interpret the information that you receive.
quotes.translation: 你的感受很大程度上源于对潜意识本质缺乏理解。正如我曾多次告诉鲁柏，你不可能成为纯粹的信息通道，让信息奇迹般流经你。你是一个人格，必须诠释你所接收的信息。

quotes.translation: 当你反复经历这种对比，直到能清晰觉察其差异时，你便会产生一种主观感受——内在的知晓点——它会明确指示你的意识在物质实相中最精微聚焦时的状态。

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.

quotes.text: The woman who had interests beyond those acceptable as feminine was often in the same position. Because the intellect and the emotions were considered so separately, however, attempts to express intuitive abilities often resulted in, and often do result in, "unreasonable" behavior.

quotes.text: That soul constantly creates the body, and each individual on the face of the earth at any given time places his or her trust in that reality. That feeling of certainty is the same that any plant knows. Any idea, creative insight, or dream, rides upon the same sure thrust.
quotes.translation: 那个灵魂持续创造着身体，地球上每个个体在任何特定时刻都将自己的信任寄托于那个实相。这种确定感与任何植物所知的感受相同。任何想法、创造性洞见或梦境，都乘着同样笃定的推力前行。

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now we think of an episode--I will avoid the word affair--a particular episode occurring a while back in connection with Philip's daughter, in her bedroom or by her bed. I believe late at night, perhaps when she was ill, but in connection with strong feeling on his part.
quotes.translation: 现在我们来思考一个片段——我避免使用"事件"这个词——一个与菲利普女儿相关的特定片段，发生在她卧室或床边。我相信是深夜，或许在她生病时，但与他强烈的感受有关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now Ruburt grows unsure as far as Dr. Instream's tests are concerned, when we are asked for a specific object, and this does hamper us. However this feeling will vanish as we continue, and again, it is a natural reaction on his part so he should not blame himself for it.
quotes.translation: 如今当被要求寻找特定物品时，鲁柏对因斯特里姆博士的测试变得不确定，这确实妨碍了我们。不过随着我们继续，这种感受会消失，而且再次强调，这是他自然的反应，因此他不应为此自责。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In the beginning you could not have painted if you had not allowed yourself to develop this technique, which allowed you to use Emotion and yet contain it. (Long pause.) These elements helped form and define your abilities, adding to their particular and peculiar nature.
quotes.translation: 起初，若非你允许自己发展这项技巧——让你得以运用情感却又将其收束——你根本无法作画。（长停顿。）这些元素帮助塑造并界定了你的能力，为其增添了独特而奇异的特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. Psychologically alone this is beneficial, for it acts against those feelings of despair that can creep up during the winter season. And by reminding men of a birth and a resurrection it hints at the innate abilities of the race to transcend physical time and space.
quotes.translation: 现在。单从心理层面而言，这便是有益的，因为它能抵御冬季悄然滋生的绝望感。而通过提醒人们关于诞生与复活，它暗示了人类超越物理时空的天赋能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There may be a strong feeling of oneness with All That Is. This is of course much to those who have been primarily ego oriented, and it represents a meaningful breakthrough that can indeed provide the opportunity and impetus for a far more fulfilling earthly existence.
quotes.translation: 或许会涌现一种与万有合一的强烈感受。这自然对向来以自我为导向的人意义重大，它代表了一次意义深远的突破，确实能为更充实的尘世存在提供契机与动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... A stone's physical shadow will faithfully mirror its form. In those terms, little creativity is allowed it. Far greater leeway exists, however, as a thought or feeling in the dream world casts its greater shadow out upon the landscape of the mind.
quotes.translation: 稍等片刻……石头的物理阴影会忠实地映照其形态。就此而言，它几乎不被允许展现创造力。然而，在梦境世界中，思想或情感拥有远为广阔的空间——它们将更宏大的阴影投射在心灵的原野上。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 720
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: They are negative feelings, deliberately exaggerated so that he can understand their nature and handle them as such. Your therapy was highly successful. I refer to your shopping endeavor (on Saturday March, 29) and the therapy of delight in small things, and laughter.
quotes.translation: 这些是负面情绪，被刻意夸大，好让他能认清其本质并妥善处理。你的治疗非常成功。我指的是你（3月29日周六）的购物尝试，以及在小事与欢笑中寻得喜悦的疗愈之道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Association or no, physically you will remember events in time, with present moments neatly following past ones. The psyche deals largely with associative processes, however, as it organizes events through association. Time as such has little meaning in that framework. Associations are tied together, so to speak, by emotional experience. In a large manner, the emotions defy time.
quotes.translation: 无论联想与否，在物理层面你都会按时间顺序记住事件，当下时刻整齐地紧随过往。然而，心灵主要处理联想过程——它通过联想来组织事件。在此框架中，时间本身几乎毫无意义。可以说，联想是由情感体验串联起来的。从广义上讲，情感蔑视时间。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is rather unpleasant, but such an energy used unwittingly, say, when Ruburt was feeling upset with a certain person, could lead to unfavorable circumstances for the person involved, nor is this shades of witchcraft. Any energy can be used for almost any purpose.
quotes.translation: 这相当不愉快，但若这种能量被无意中使用，比如当鲁柏对某人生气时，可能会给相关人士带来不利情况，这并非巫术的阴影。任何能量几乎都可以用于任何目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt's forgotten-till-now experience with music was legitimate. Actually it reoccurred many times, I believe, and was always discarded by the conscious mind. Again, this involves feeling sound. That is all I will say for the moment, but it is a valuable foretaste.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏那被遗忘至今的音乐体验是真实的。实际上，我相信它多次重现，但总被意识心所摒弃。这再次涉及感受声音。我目前只能说这么多，但这是一次宝贵的预尝。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The skin of the apple must also give the feeling that it is more than an enclosure, for through it energy from the sun also comes. While it seems solid it is open, and connected with the rest of the universe. An apple in a room goes out into that room. Do you see?
quotes.translation: 苹果的表皮也必须给人一种感觉，即它不仅仅是外壳，因为太阳的能量也通过它进入。虽然它看似坚固，却是开放的，并与宇宙的其他部分相连。房间里的一个苹果会延伸进那个房间。你明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Denied feelings gather Emotional impetus, and form Emotional storms. There are ways to prevent such buildups. I strongly suggested a vacation, and it is because prior conditions were still operating that the two of you did not overcome your obstacles and leave.
quotes.translation: 被否认的感受会积累情绪动力，并形成情绪风暴。有方法可以防止这种积累。我强烈建议休假，正是因为先前的条件仍在运作，你们俩才未能克服障碍离开。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: If he feels this is withdrawn his secure confidence is shattered and his energy dwindles. In his case however there is no danger that you would be Emotionally smothered, for he has also this love of work and isolation, and feeling for his and your independence.
quotes.translation: 如果他觉得这种支持被撤回，他稳固的信心就会破碎，能量也会减少。然而，在他的情况下，你不会有被情绪窒息的风险，因为他同样热爱工作和独处，并珍视他和你的独立性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: With Ruburt's consent however, and I have it, I could make such a blast of masculine voice that you would indeed be embarrassed when the neighbors complained （louder）. It is to show my humorous consideration for your feelings that I do not so indulge （louder）.
quotes.translation: 不过，在鲁柏的同意下（我已获得同意），我可以发出如此强烈的男性声音，以至于当邻居抱怨时（更大声），你确实会感到尴尬。这是为了显示我幽默地顾及你的感受，才没有如此放纵（更大声）。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Primarily they refer to your own subconscious feelings toward your father. Not only in regard to yourself, but in regard to your younger brother, and to Ruburt. Now this is on one level, and for a few moments we shall speak about the dreams on this level only.
quotes.translation: 这些主要指向你对父亲潜意识的感受，不仅关乎你自己，也关乎你弟弟和鲁柏。现在我们只在这个层面上讨论片刻，仅就这个层面谈谈这些梦境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: To begin with dictation: Your moods and emotions have greater mobility in the dream state. You may feel rooted like a tree at one moment and in the next experience yourself as a beautiful peacock, in which case you will perceive the tree change into the bird.
quotes.translation: 先开始口述：你的情绪和情感在梦境状态中具有更大的流动性。你可能前一秒还像一棵树般扎根，下一秒就体验自己成为一只美丽的孔雀，此时你会看到树变成了鸟。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Yet the sessions also help your work, and you cannot count the ways that you have learned from them. You are feeling crowded, however. This is to you, Joseph. Therefore I suggest that we have a week's vacation. On your account this time, and not on Ruburt s.
quotes.translation: 然而这些课程也帮助了你的工作，你无法计算从中学到了多少。不过你现在感到拥挤了。这是对你说的，约瑟。因此我建议我们休假一周。这次是为了你，而不是为了鲁柏。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These psychic entities are real, however. It is quite true to say that their reality consists not only of the core of their own identity, but also is reinforced by those projected thoughts and feelings of the earthly audience for whom the drama is enacted.
quotes.translation: 但这些灵性实体是真实的。说它们的实相不仅包含自身身份的核心，还通过观众投射的思想和情感得到强化——那些为戏剧上演的人间观众——这是完全正确的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now I have the feeling of a funeral, though this may be symbolic. But there is a connection with a car, perhaps a black one. This could explain the funeral impression. A disturbed afternoon, and an argument, and the strong impression, again, of a breakage.
quotes.translation: 现在我感受到葬礼的气息，尽管这可能是象征性的。但与一辆车有关联，也许是黑色的。这可以解释葬礼的印象。一个不安的下午，一场争执，以及再次出现的强烈破碎感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He once, and not purposely, broke a mans back in an accident involving horses. There was no deep guilt involved. Nevertheless in the woman's existence he passed by a feeling of guilt. This time he mends peoples backs, but this is not the only connection.
quotes.translation: 他曾在一场涉及马匹的事故中无意间弄断了一个人的背。当时并没有深重的内疚感。然而在这位女性的存在中，他感受到一种内疚的掠过。这次他修复人们的背部，但这并非唯一的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now I have often said that suffering of itself is not "good for the soul." It is not a virtue, yet certainly many individuals seem to seek suffering. Suffering cannot be dismissed from human experience as a freak matter of distorted emotions or beliefs.
quotes.translation: 我常说过，受苦本身并非"对灵魂有益"。它不是一种美德，但确实有许多人似乎在追寻苦难。苦难不能被视为扭曲情绪或信念的异常现象而从人类经验中抹去。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The agony itself and the stupendous desire to create represented its proof of its own reality. The feelings in other words were adequate proof to All That Is that it was. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 那痛苦本身，以及那创造奇迹的强烈渴望，证明了它自身的真实性。换言之，这些感受向一切万有充分证明了它的存在。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The conscious mind will benefit greatly as it becomes more and more aware of its directing influence upon events. It will no longer fear the emotions, or the body, as threatening or unpredictable, but sense the greater unity in which it is involved.
quotes.translation: 当意识心越来越意识到自己对事件的引导影响力时，它将受益匪浅。它不再恐惧情绪或身体具有威胁性或不可预测性，而是感受到自身所参与的更大统一性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is the essence of yourself. Its sweeps are broad in range, however. It does not determine, for example, specific events. (Pause.) It paints the colors in the large "landscape" of your experience. It is the feeling of yourself, inexhaustible.
quotes.translation: 它是你自身的本质。然而，它的涵盖范围极为广阔。例如，它并不决定特定事件。（停顿）它为你经验的"大风景"涂上色彩。它是你对自己的感受，取之不尽。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The sound, light, and electromagnetic patterns give strength and vitality to the physical form that you recognize. They are more mobile than the physical body, and even more susceptible to the changing pattern of your own thought and emotion.
quotes.translation: 声音、光线和电磁模式为你所认知的肉体形态赋予力量与活力。它们比肉体更具流动性，甚至更容易受到你自身思想与情绪变化模式的影响。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: We have some further recommendations. It is difficult in one evening to give you all the important data. You have been denying your own feelings for some time, or only giving lip service to them, and we will have to set you straight and free.
quotes.translation: 我们还有一些进一步建议。一个晚上很难给你所有重要资料。你有一段时间一直在否认自己的感受，或只是口头上敷衍它们，我们必须让你端正态度并重获自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You were quite correct, Joseph, in your feeling that art created another plane, and now let me hit you with this one: that the paintings of an artist to some degree have a consciousness of their own, not imprisoned either by the form itself.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，你直觉艺术创造了另一个层面，这完全正确。现在让我告诉你这一点：艺术家的画作在某种程度上拥有自己的意识，并不被形式本身所禁锢。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Dictation: Today Ruburt received a call from a young woman I will name Andrea. She is a lovely young blonde. I would like to use this instance as an excellent example of the ways in which conscious beliefs affect your feelings and behavior.
quotes.translation: 口授：今天鲁柏接到一位年轻女子的电话，我称她为安德莉亚。她是一位可爱的金发女郎。我想用这个例子来完美说明有意识的信念如何影响你的感受与行为。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The connections between creativity and aggression have never been understood in your society. A misunderstanding of true aggression can lead into a fear of all emotion, and cause you to cut yourself off from one of nature's best therapies.
quotes.translation: 在你们的社会中，创造力与攻击性之间的关联从未被理解。对真正攻击性的误解会导致对所有情感的恐惧，并让你切断与自然最佳疗愈方式之一的联系。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is the only basis for any belief, regardless of rationalization. Intellectual acceptance of me as a complete survival personality will follow the intuitive knowledge. The intellect will never, alone, convince the Emotions of any fact.
quotes.translation: 这是任何信念的唯一基础，无论其合理化程度如何。对我作为完整存续人格的智性接受，将跟随直觉认知而来。仅凭智性永远无法说服情感相信任何事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now: You are the living picture of yourself. You project what you think you are outward into flesh. Your feelings, your conscious and unconscious thoughts, all alter and form your physical image. This is fairly easy for you to understand.
quotes.translation: 现在：你是自己的活生生画像。你将自认为的模样向外投射为肉身。你的感受、有意识与无意识的思想，都在改变并塑造你的形体形象。这对你而言相当容易理解。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I will despite my own feeling end the session very shortly. There will be no Wednesday session, and that will be your rest period. It is not long. I had planned to give you tonight completely free, but I want to make a few points first.
quotes.translation: 尽管我有所感受，但很快就会结束这节课程。周三将没有课程，那将是你们的休息期。时间不长。我原本计划今晚完全让你们自由，但我想先提出几点要点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is not as easy, however, to realize that your feelings and thoughts form your exterior experience in the same way, or that the events that appear to happen to you are initiated by you within your mental or psychic inner environment.
quotes.translation: 然而，要认识到你的情感和思想同样在塑造你的外在经验，或者那些看似发生在你身上的事件其实是由你内在的心理或心灵环境所引发，这并不容易。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The precise delineation helped create the subject of the painting beautifully, with almost "supernatural" in quotes, precision. Yet the lines also served to protect you from that which you were painting, and from the feeling involved.
quotes.translation: 精确的轮廓勾勒使画作的主题呈现出近乎“超自然”的精准美感。然而，这些线条也同时保护你免受所绘之物及其相关情感的侵扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: To some extent or another man's desires and emotions merge with the physical aspects of nature as you understand it, so that such storms or disasters are as much the result of psychological activity as they are of weather conditions.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，人类的欲望与情感与你所理解的自然物质层面相互融合，因此这类风暴或灾难既是天气状况的结果，也是心理活动的产物。

quotes.text: A relative might be ready to die, though no exterior sign has been given. The relative's feelings might well be mixed, containing portions of relief and sadness, which you might then perceive -- but the primary events are subjective.
quotes.translation: 一位亲人可能已准备好离世，尽管没有任何外在迹象表露。这位亲人的感受很可能复杂交织，包含解脱与悲伤的成分——你或许能感知到这些——但首要事件始终是主观的。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

source_raw.title: (Five weeks ago [in the notes leading off Session 821], I wrote that Jane could resume work on The Further Education of Oversoul Seven -- or Seven Two -- at any time. She finished her first novel about Seven in July 1972, and within a month, long before it was published, she wrote the first five chapters for Seven Two. Then we became involved in so many other projects that she laid it aside until August 1976, when she wrote two more chapters. The book has hovered in the back of her consciousness ever since, waiting until she focused her attention upon it once again. "Seven's got all the time in the world," she laughed more than once. But now that her editor, Tam Mossman, has scheduled a visit to us at the hill house in a couple of weeks [on April 10, to be exact], Jane feels that she wants to study what she's done on Seven Two, go over it with Tam, and perhaps take up work on it again.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You thought you would settle down and paint on your fine farm, but instead you turned into a farmer, and a lecherous one at that. There is some connection here with your ambiguous feelings about money now, you see, and possessions.
quotes.translation: 你原以为会在美丽的农场上安顿下来专心作画，结果却成了农夫，还是个好色的农夫。这与你现在对金钱和财产的矛盾情感存在某种关联，你明白吗？
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Once you understand this you have only to learn to examine the nature of your beliefs, for these will automatically cause you to feel and think in certain fashions. Your emotions follow your beliefs. It is not the other way around.
quotes.translation: 一旦你理解这点，只需学会检视信念的本质，因为这些信念会自动促使你以特定方式感受和思考。你的情感追随你的信念，而非相反。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The painting itself, and any painting, rises out of the empty board through the force of your own emotions, and the board becomes the focal point that collects, draws together and directs the energy from your inner self, into form.
quotes.translation: 画作本身，以及任何画作，都是通过你自身情感的力量从空白画布中浮现出来的，画布成为焦点，收集、汇聚并引导来自你内在自我的能量，使之成形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Ruburt is subconsciously aware of them in most cases, but seldom brings this to consciousness, so it is simply a feeling of disquietude on his part. He feels he will be interrupted, but is not consciously aware of this, you see.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏在大多数情况下潜意识里知道它们，但很少将其带入意识层面，所以对他来说只是一种不安的感觉。他觉得自己会被打断，但并没有有意识地意识到这一点，你看。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Between those extremes of terror and intense joy however, where the intensity itself can almost form the same sort of grimace, there are infinite varieties of emotions, these being reflected in every minute shadow and gesture.
quotes.translation: 然而，在恐惧与狂喜这两个极端之间，当强度本身几乎能形成同样的扭曲表情时，存在着无限多样的情感，这些情感反映在每一个细微的阴影和姿态中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The pendulum is an excellent method of discovering your subconscious feelings, and indeed of changing them. As you both suppose, incidentally, the music you played this evening was highly beneficial from several standpoints.
quotes.translation: 钟摆是发现你潜意识感受的绝佳方法，实际上也能改变它们。顺便提一下，正如你们两人所推测的那样，你们今晚播放的音乐从几个角度来看都非常有益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I want you to capture that feeling of accomplishment, and to translate it, or transfer it, to areas in which you have had difficulty. But you must remember that the ideas exist first and the experience physically follows.
quotes.translation: 我希望你捕捉到那种成就感，并将其转化或转移到你曾遇到困难的领域。但你必须记住，观念首先存在，然后体验在物质层面随之而来。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You take dreaming for granted, yet it is the result of a characteristic ability that is responsible for the very subjective feeling that you call conscious life. Without it your normal consciousness would not be possible.
quotes.translation: 你把做梦视为理所当然，然而它却是一种特有能力的产物，这种能力正是你称之为意识生活的那种主观感受的根源。没有它，你正常的意识就不可能存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: Books on positive thinking alone, while sometimes beneficial, usually do not take into consideration the habitual nature of negative feelings, aggressions, or repressions. Often these are merely swept under the rug.
quotes.translation: 现在：单靠正面思考的书籍，虽然有时有益，但通常没有考虑到负面情绪、攻击性或压抑的习惯性本质。这些往往只是被扫到地毯下。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Something overturned. The feeling of a fluid dark color, broken by white shapes that appear like blocks. Perhaps some connection with a pond or pool shape. The object marked in the middle of the back, in pen or pencil.
quotes.translation: 某物被翻倒。一种流动的深色感觉，被像方块一样的白色形状打破。可能与池塘或水池形状有关。背部中间用钢笔或铅笔标记的物体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Settle on a reasonable amount (underlined). See them in your mind as your balance, and following Maltz you will then feel those Emotions suitably connected with the desired amount. This is what you have not accepted.
quotes.translation: 确定一个合理的数额（下划线）。在脑海中将它们视为你的余额，然后按照马尔茨的方法，你会感受到那些与期望数额适当关联的情绪。这就是你尚未接受的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Often Ruburt has not been in touch with his own feelings, but would try to intellectualize many away. He needs to realize that it is safe to express himself -- and that expression will not bring about abandonment.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏常常没有接触自己的感受，而是试图将许多感受理智化。他需要认识到表达自己是安全的——而表达不会导致被抛弃。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (I talked about the first session for Jane's symptoms -- the private portion of Session 208, for November 15, 1965 -- yet she said that for her the whole thing really started the day before we went to a party in June 1966 regarding How to Develop Your ESP Power. Our friends wanted to celebrate the publication of her first "psychic" book, her first mention of Seth, but she read poetry at the party and wouldn't talk about the ESP book -- too embarrassed. A strange, protective way to behave.

quotes.text: It has been tinged psychologically in its entry through the subconscious, but that is all. Emotions are the most vital tools with which you have to work. It is for this reason that you must learn how to use them.
quotes.translation: 它在通过潜意识进入时已带有心理色彩，但仅此而已。情绪是你必须使用的最重要的工具。正是因为这个原因，你必须学会如何运用它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This should be clearly understood, for our progress depends upon a feeling of trust, and fears of this nature will impede us. You may consider the whole above paragraph stated again, it is that important to us.
quotes.translation: 这一点应被清楚理解，因为我们的进展依赖于信任感，而这种性质的恐惧会阻碍我们。你可以认为以上整段话被再次强调，它对我们如此重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am not telling you to inhibit thoughts or feelings. I am asking that you become aware of those you have. Realize that they form your reality. Concentrate upon those that give you the results that you want.
quotes.translation: 我并非要你压抑思想或感受，而是要求你觉察自己所拥有的那些思想与感受，明白它们构成了你的实相，专注于那些能带给你想要结果的思想与感受。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Usually exaggerated opposing emotions will also be apparent. Once you understand this it is not difficult to look at your beliefs to identify these, and to find a bridge to unite the seeming contradictions.
quotes.translation: 通常，夸张的对立情绪也会显现。一旦你理解这一点，就不难审视自己的信念来识别它们，并找到一座桥梁来统一那些看似矛盾之处。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is well known that emotions have a chemical reality, but it is not generally realized that dreams also have the same sort of property. Telepathy is indeed affected by chemical reactions, as dreams are.
quotes.translation: 众所周知，情绪具有化学实相，但人们通常没有意识到，梦境也具有同样的属性。心灵感应确实受化学反应影响，正如梦境一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As you know you are apt sometimes to use a problem with technique as a substitute problem, as a way therefore of escaping from, rather than facing, certain issues concerning the nature of emotion. (Pause.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，你有时容易将技术性问题当作替代性问题，以此作为逃避而非面对某些关于情绪本质议题的方式。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: He fears that you will feel forced to give him more love than you want to. This is partially a leftover from his realization of your feelings of jealousy, you see. All of this material is very important.
quotes.translation: 他担心你会被迫给予他超出你本意的爱。这在一定程度上源于他察觉到你曾有过的嫉妒感受，你看。所有这些资料都非常重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: His pent-up feeling could result in rather undisciplined psychic explosions that could be dangerous, though not necessarily so. This has its basis in Ruburt's early life, and I will go into that later.
quotes.translation: 他压抑的情感可能导致相当不受约束的心灵爆发，虽非必然，但可能具有危险性。这源于鲁柏的早期生活，我稍后会深入探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Since physical environment of itself is not one thing that can be taken with you, but a relationship within a personal perspective, where then does the feeling of consistency of environment originate?
quotes.translation: 既然物质环境本身并非可以随身携带之物，而是个人视角内的一种关系，那么环境一致性的感觉又从何而来呢？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, before we plunge into the nature and characteristics of dream reality, let us briefly consider the relationship between emotions, space, and distance as they occur within the waking conditions.
quotes.translation: 现在，在我们深入探讨梦之实相的本质与特性之前，让我们先简要考虑一下情绪、空间与距离在清醒状态下的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now the man involved has something to do with mechanics. I am not sure of the age. Between, I should say, 27 and 37, though this is not precise, I know. I have the feeling she may be older.
quotes.translation: 这位男士与机械有关。我不太确定他的年龄。应该在27到37岁之间，虽然我知道这并不精确。我有种感觉她可能年纪更大些。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. What I am trying to tell you is that a thought or a feeling, with all its varieties of intensities, is more like time, like the true nature of time, than all of your minutes or hours.
quotes.translation: 现在。我想告诉你们的是，一个思想或一种感觉，带着它所有强度的变化，更像时间，更像时间的真实本质，而不是你们所有的分秒或小时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You mentioned earlier Joseph that you had the feeling that I could refer back to myself almost as if I could turn a later page of a book to an earlier one, and of course this is the case.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，你之前提到过，你觉得我可以回溯到自身，就像我能把一本书的后页翻到前页一样，而事实确实如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Any of your emotions liberate hormones, but these also leave you as your breath leaves you; and in that respect you can say that you release chemicals into the air that then affect it.
quotes.translation: 你们的任何一种情绪都会释放荷尔蒙，但这些荷尔蒙也会像你们的呼吸一样离开你们；就此而言，你们可以说自己向空气中释放了化学物质，从而影响了空气。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: To me, an Emotion will automatically be translated into color in many instances. Here you see--but try this: do you see a connection between the color red and the word quick?
quotes.translation: 对我来说，情绪在许多情况下会自动转化为颜色。你在这里看到——但试试这个：你看到红色和“快速”这个词之间的联系了吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The travel connection again. Now the feeling of trains, or a tunnel, as a train tunnel would be. This is an attempt to get at the curved corridor connection more clearly.
quotes.translation: 又是旅行连接。现在，火车的感觉，或者隧道，就像火车隧道一样。这是为了更清晰地触及弯曲走廊的连接。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You need time to do your own work, but it is also true that the intuitions and emotions that spark your own work are not dependent on time, and exist quite apart from it.
quotes.translation: 你需要时间来做自己的工作，但激发你工作的直觉和情绪并不依赖时间，它们完全独立于时间存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Nine. Could be nine children? ...We'll go back to this later, I'm not sure. I have the feeling that all this is preliminary, that it leads to something else.
quotes.translation: 九。可能是九个孩子？……我们稍后再回到这个问题，我不确定。我感觉这一切都是初步的，它指向了别的东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: We will shortly return to a discussion of such "causes," and their relationship with the person's feeling that life has or does not have a meaning.
quotes.translation: 我们很快就会回到对这类“原因”的讨论，以及它们与个人感觉生活是否有意义之间的关系。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Through such feelings the psyche breaks through all misconceptions, hinting at the nature of the self and of the universe at once.
quotes.translation: 通过这些感觉，心灵突破了所有误解，同时暗示了自我和宇宙的本质。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Quite literally, the "inner" self forms the body by magically transforming thoughts and emotions into physical counterparts ...
quotes.translation: 确实，内在自我通过将思想和情感神奇地转化为物质对应物来形成身体……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (So far we've been dealing with the idea of counterparts in our own physical reality. By way of contrast, however, Seth stated last month in the 713th session, after 10:32:) Nothing exists outside the psyche, however, that does not exist within it, and there is no unknown world that does not have its psychological or psychic counterpart. (Before that, from Session 712:) To some extent or another, there are counterparts of all realities within your psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It is, indeed. However, telepathy does exist. Others are aware, then, to a large extent of what you are thinking and feeling.
quotes.translation: 确实如此。然而，心灵感应确实存在。因此，他人很大程度上能感知到你的所思所感。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A note and a sender who is not feeling well. This is vague. A mid-thirty connection here, or three five perhaps.
quotes.translation: 一张便条和一位身体不适的发送者。这很模糊。这里存在三十岁中段的关联，或者可能是三十五岁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: And in such cases we have every right to go with direct experience and our feelings.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，我们完全有权遵循直接体验和感受。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: The emotions indeed do form the expectations, and it is not the other way around.
quotes.translation: 情感确实形成期待，而非相反。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
